name: Monica Carpio
subject: Hello Sir Peter !
body:
Monica Carpio, Candidate for Congress for Virginia's 8th District, 2022.

Monica Carpio is an Ivy-league graduate economist with 15 years of Federal
service with the US Dept. of Labor and the Dept. of Commerce. With a
Bachelors Degree from Stanford University and an Masters Degree in
Economics from Cornell University, she exemplifies an understanding of how
macroeconomic policies can help or hurt our country, leading us to great
heights or down to new lows such as the Biden Administration's record
inflation and a looming energy crisis.

Monica, who is of Peruvian descent, was born in San Diego but has lived in
the DC area for over 20 years. She is a mother of 2 young daughters in the
Fairfax County school system and became politically active when she
witnessed how parents lost their voice and power over their own children's
treatment during the Covid pandemic. She then became a volunteer for the
OPEN Fairfax Schools Coalition as well as Glenn Youngkin's campaign for
Governor.

Monica's vision for Congress is to retire an overspending wealthy liberal,
promote fiscal policies that mitigate inflation and promote job growth,
bring more women and minorities into the Republican family, and promote law
and order. She will represent Virginia's 8th District with a fresh passion
and vigor that the current career politicians cannot imagine.

thanks ++ Joe Messina, Campaign Manager 703-624-4066

name: James Tarantin
subject: These Holy Days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Tarantin for the United States Senate
body:
Peter, we have to protect our traditional values.
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr8oKolz157M13XDyy0iV4lCxcmAXDaqHxg2jU4YGF8quPcVcPOrp7Q4eDpIK3k8CaMw-bC6X3YtIQrNDuEUp91AxVMhL-qMelHE2td4GMQSQdX3MHyDhTlxGlB3rWFN_MGSPLIGgGsyeF9x57blPRXJmUuwTao48uBHT8TegeCdKMdgp0aCKMAvZL9q-xUwJ_y0uE0pxazZQOasBOaWk0lp-oJIMGYYmYK6ZGuE-My1e)

Peter,

It’s Good Friday and the start of Passover, celebrating the exodus of the Israelites from Slavery. **_To me and many others, these holidays demonstrate the divine miracles that show God comes before the government._**

Yet, not a single radical liberal would ever admit that. To them, these are political talking points for social media, while they quietly push anti-Israel policies and extend their hands to terrorists.

**I don’t say that lightly either. Look what happened with the Taliban in Afghanistan and the extremists in Iran. Now the Biden administration wants to have open discussions with these groups which are full of international terrorists?**

They persecute Christians, Jews, women, and anyone else they decide is beneath them while chanting “Death to America.” These are the people Joe Biden wants to have a diplomatic relationship with.

Now, while the radical liberals and Joe Biden want to befriend terrorists, we need to remember what this time of year represents. [**It’s about celebrating and protecting our traditional values, especially the Judeo-Christian values that founded our United States**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr4r39Ig4OHxajl6DW64LfMBCVW4mrV_m9J6HW2pX1ejPV8xMtXtSm5VWFP5czU8cHZYK_l9ue62Ka-2PPOBJr1pdeC8n2oKZyypqTWBXG9UmTmQtziC2HCWxPax5v0bvRw5IrqsGUEbinOmzykpPKpWI300v4jEWCeZXJGWNjkmbYFdXTLfmgsXsRL6-8gCyBGEX8LYXen_ubKXKiVmS1UHYakrxU0rwnHTTqlPhG0mU)

[**STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISITAN VALUES**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr2SK9zL79RrEf6h4oY7F2eL4Vg4-93K8zG8ZlDNQDSuWpeQF7Lh8ST4EmJenrL-cD43z6Fv1pJvgh-EIM4FgtoYFmvcedszPDh-NqC42kYq_LcAtW3OQJ26iLaZ6ngX3vw-n_fNnIRkpAqX80m7bxkZlVul9YLepagmZ3O2ArisYJHBg2wH40Ct_6c9rs4ggxdfGIPLjIEjJBWX-hCuFjacnrBSWt7uDq1tXtI7OlJrZ)
We need to start making history and standing for the values that made this nation so great to begin with. **Take me for example, I’m the only Israeli-American to run for the United States Senate, and I’m running because much like these Holy Days, America is seen as a miracle to the world.**

**We cannot allow our miracle to be extinguished because of radical anti-Semitic politicians like Ilhan Omar and The Squad who only want to see us grow weaker by the day.** [**We must stand up for the values that made this nation great, are you with me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr0bl0x9im-W5Ps8foM9aHt1rNUrx3NUoHW6MdkIPmcNIxD3RAQT_zo-CU22PfbPBUyyEYwG7HSLuyiBxYCqgHVqi5dqLT0G1WfltjczJflzp8XZ-nRZKqnICKpbKQC4HwKd55ov-ziIS8Va2NUO6hGJ29vZt-4_6-t3f-klwh6HYPGH0_7LfudmLgaHTuKsvl0ub_CFM2ZhM_1ALwgmovq03KenbS-AssCMszLrkmQB0)

[**STAND WITH JAMES TARANTIN TO PROTECT OUR JUDEO-CHRISITAN VALUES**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvrybXUkfxxwIF6lukL49HJ5IZG4GHSIAwktgm8kuSw-MpPemW0Ze1ZiCEdRFHwCSFv3XUBTwObpjvZP3hguLcOqFdGybs4jQhEe0ddXVESVPmyDP6HsSojE5Wgyd5zbkUTb9-h-hvnqPigXUk-J2UvQgsY1z-GPL5o5xDyhtZxglwqmstOF16YcrdhgfTMYBTZeAOAW6Y3dAnUybbUGE40-MrE1cCw-Ct_DODnkFDs5iL)
**If you’re anything like me then I know you’re Pro-America, Pro-Israel, and you agree that our nation was founded on Judeo-Christian Values.** We need to get our country back to that way of thinking and the first step to getting there is by winning back the Majority in the Senate.

America is a miracle to this world, and I need your help so we can restore and protect our traditional values. [**If you agree with me then please help me become the next Republican Senator from Maryland, so we can finally win back the America we know and love.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr4IRB___1nEuUpJOv_yO3IsWZmOLA07D3YeTc0419WHO3yCjZTAeXC9T70Slkv6SZI1gC09kwkTzpEnAypORNgJ4WL7BCpN9aFW1Lm39RgxIF2X4xlBz-1Gkf699p4PHSUPK_TH9xyHSYaXOmw_FxhhpeQOnSLN-IR6glxcqRwIbjELydIQaVs9JW8wGbOi1_eSdw-MtCZlbXs6PgG2ScgeKJWdKYnOpUiWgqf8Wwmku)

Thank you and God bless,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=18df957d356844d6b6fd0393460dbb82&_e=vCjf0RxkffZC9LvdntMvAQuBCSOoTmlTOKUVDQdI5C6pFiJ-ZXhPVAsN_slt47Dp0fmge_MxRkB6LB0bFv-0FQPamHxtHvv8n4j74ozAhVjLHjBxvQCwBsFjqK3WNK4OYqtJWFspEZbxKCtEA3WOV3aJAAzAeM6RayWMYREK3fejdIyWXyq7HsCmw0KNYI6-puPf4xfR_bmOrW954SclMhb8dPdg1ER4C8tDAPgdBpi6N6xkvbKHrwwj-2vkMxB5npgL-7RRwWSYzpskTSIvr38gadLeBW_BbA7zHWYnFQ3lZ1-kbFDKA6f9i2NChzpiGvbhfKf4P6gysNVArSCHsf8kKtBkCzOM5Wv7IVIeFiQNh7x2qLDXgWcmIgpxwCGSjZIkfTvxXmXU1hFy0J_BMVs0OrgEH3iFugxIFHiMArBEQ43qmDNEu1evxmobBOKtKhvXRdnPMy9tHg0rJWt-z0uN7rzpSOSFhcsIoscaykAtOs1IX0SZHX-HLYUwvKqS)
**James Tarantin for U.S. Senate**

name: John Fetterman
subject: a personal note from me to Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
You can roll your eyes, but read it all the way through, okay?
#
Derek,
I’ll let you get back to your Friday in a second, but I wanted to send you a quick personal note before tonight's mid-month deadline and ask if you'll **[chip in any amount that makes sense for you to support our campaign for Senate and help reach our $35,000 grassroots goal.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47319?refcode=em20220415-5406&t=1&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)**
I knoooow, I know. It’s another donation ask, and if you’re rolling your eyes at me, that’s OK. Between Gisele and the kids, I’m kind of used to it. 🙄
But maybe you can give me a minute just to remind you why we send these emails in the first place. 🙏
First of all, I *seriously* believe that it’s possible to leave this country better than my generation found it. Firmly believing that is what got me into public service to begin with. And it's why, alongside my incredible family, I decided to join this race for Senate (+ start sending you all these emails).
As much as we try to put the FUN in FUNdrai$ing with our emails, the stakes couldn’t be more serious in this race. The slower our online fundraising gets, the more ground we risk giving up Dr. Oz and David McCormick.
**That’s not an option for us, especially not when CNN just announced that this is now the most expensive Senate race in the country. 🤯**
Yep. Our Republican multi-millionaire opponents + the super PACs that support them have spent almost **$80 million** and counting — _just on TV ads._
Let that sink in for a minute...
**[Okay, alright, I'll let you get back to your day. But with a few hours before our fundraising deadline, I’m hoping you’ll take this note to heart and send a few bucks our way before midnight to help make sure we can take this fight all the way to the floor of the U.S. Senate, no matter how many GOP candidates and super PACs try to outspend us.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47319?refcode=em20220415-5406&t=2&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH) ❤️**
**[Contribute »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47319?amount=5&refcode=em20220415-5406&t=21&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)**
You don’t have to love these emails, even though I think they’re pretty sweet. The important thing is, every time we send an email like this, some of yinz chip in. And person by person, day by day, it powers our entire historic grassroots campaign. And right now, we’re SO close to reaching our $35,000 mid-month goal!!!!
Thank you for being a part of this.
— John
**[Donate Now »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47319?amount=5&refcode=em20220415-5406&t=22&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220415-5406-footer&t=23&refcode2=5406_434096_fJPJVH&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5406%2E434096%2EfJPJVH)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: This link is personalized for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We set a goal to raise $97,000 by midnight tonight.
#
Our team reached out this morning about our goal to raise $97,000 by midnight tonight. **As of this email's send time, we're officially 88% of the way there.**
As Deputy Campaign Manager, I wanted to personally reach out to explain how important this goal is — and see if we could count on your support.
A donation of any amount in these next few hours will go directly toward our mid-month goal to fund our growing organizing programs on the ground in Texas. And since Beto doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs, we're relying on this grassroots team.
**Please, if you're able, support Beto's campaign for governor with a donation before our midnight deadline. Here's a personalized link just for your use:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-personal_id=444211](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55529?refcode=ema20220415-185199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=185199%2E444211%2EvdzSV8)
You're a valued member of this team. In fact, it's everyday supporters like you that are powering this campaign to defeat Greg Abbott.
Every fundraising goal we set is based on the _exact_ amount we need to fund our programs, hire new staff, invest in digital ads, and more. **We're up against Greg Abbott's more than $60 million in the bank, so we can't be complacent.**
Whether you can give $3 or $6, every little bit helps. Here's your personal link again — a donation would mean so much to Beto and our entire team if you could spare it.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-personal_id=444211](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55529?refcode=ema20220415-185199&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=185199%2E444211%2EvdzSV8)
Thank you,
Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220415-185199-footer&t=3&refcode2=185199_444211_vdzSV8&akid=185199%2E444211%2EvdzSV8)**

clean_body: We set a goal to raise $97,000 by midnight tonight. Our team reached out this morning about our goal to raise $97,000 by midnight tonight. As of this email's send time, we're officially 88% of the way there. As Deputy Campaign Manager, I wanted to personally reach out to explain how important this goal is — and see if we could count on your support. A donation of any amount in these next few hours will go directly toward our mid-month goal to fund our growing organizing programs on the ground in Texas. And since Beto doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs, we're relying on this grassroots team. Please, if you're able, support Beto's campaign for governor with a donation before our midnight deadline. Here's a personalized link just for your use: You're a valued member of this team. In fact, it's everyday supporters like you that are powering this campaign to defeat Greg Abbott. Every fundraising goal we set is based on the exact amount we need to fund our programs, hire new staff, invest in digital ads, and more. We're up against Greg Abbott's more than $60 million in the bank, so we can't be complacent. Whether you can give $3 or $6, every little bit helps. Here's your personal link again — a donation would mean so much to Beto and our entire team if you could spare it. Thank you, Jason Lee Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

The other day I was asked: How do you plan on reflecting the needs of all voters – not just Democrats – in the governor's office?

My answer: By focusing on the issues that help people – _not_ politics.

Oregon faces major challenges, and we need a governor who's shown the ability to get tough things done. I started my career at Oregon Food Bank. I traveled around the state listening to Oregonians about why they needed to access emergency food. It wasn't just about food. It was about low wages, the cost of housing, and the burden of medical debt. These stories have been my guiding light ever since.

Right, left or center, Oregonians want the same things - good jobs, good schools, a healthy environment. That's why I've focused on delivering results to make life better for Oregonians.

I believe that when every part of Oregon is successful, it's good for all of us. As Governor, I'm going to do a lot of listening, and I'll get out of Salem every chance I can to sit with Oregonians and solve our problems together.

That is why your donation matters. It **boosts** our campaign and helps us get over the finish line to get to the **REAL WORK.**

**[As governor, my priority will be delivering for the people of Oregon. But I need your support to get there. Will you stand with me and contribute $5 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44189618/340489287/1324368245?refcode=em22_220415_mm2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMWU3MWI1YS0xY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AKVxdqqUk6CxoDvPPv-pkvk0ZKBoy9kjXgbAtqp-lEM=)**

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Republicans just tried to kick me off the ballot and FAILED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9452?t=6&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4) Friend,

For weeks now, Washington Republicans have waged coordinated attacks to kick me off the ballot and ensure their buddy Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) coasts to reelection. It's a fight that we took all the way to the Iowa Supreme Court – **and today, the court ruled UNANIMOUSLY in our favor. National Republicans' desperate and partisan attempt to end this grassroots campaign has FAILED.**

Now, the fight continues. The fight for a voice for Iowa's working families in Washington, and the fight for an expanded Democratic Senate majority that will get things done for the American people. [**_Achieving all that means defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley and flipping this seat blue, and if you're with me, then I'm asking you to split a donation of $3 between my campaign and Voter Protection Project. Whatever you give will ensure we have the resources to keep fighting these attacks and defeat Sen. Grassley on Election Day._**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9453?t=8&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9459?t=14&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9460?t=15&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9461?t=16&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
These attempts to dismantle our campaign were pathetic, plain and simple. The only reason national Republicans did this is because they know Sen. Grassley is facing RECORD-LOW approval ratings with Iowa voters, and that only 27% of likely voters said they want to reelect the guy. Instead of trying to face our campaign head on, they dragged us through the court system to drain our resources with costly legal fees.

**But our justice system saw right through their desperate attempts to thwart democracy, with every justice on the Iowa Supreme Court ruling our campaign deserves to be on the ballot.**

From here, we’re going to keep talking to Iowans in every corner of the state and building our coalition to beat Chuck Grassley. Today, national Republicans lost again, and we’re going to make sure that they lose in November, too. **But the GOP have more than $41 million in the bank to keep on attacking me throughout the course of the campaign.** We need massive resources to take Chuck Grassley on with full force this November – that starts with grassroots supporters like you.

**This was a huge victory that wouldn't have been possible without you. Let's keep it up.[_Please, to ensure I can defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority, split a donation now between my campaign and Voter Protection Project. Nobody will fight harder than I will to flip this seat blue. You have my word._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9453?t=18&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)**
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9459?t=24&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9460?t=25&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9461?t=26&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
I appreciate you being on my grassroots team. Let's go win this.

–Abby
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=1849%2E878179%2E-UX1B4)

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: It's time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Help get me on the ballot! Peter,It's time!**On April 15th you can start passing nomination papers to get me on your ballot.** I need patriots like you to ensure that I have enough signatures to be on your ballot.Democrats have a bullseye on Wisconsin for 2022 because they know if this state flips blue, they could squeak by in their last-ditch attempt to hold onto power in Washington. Pelosi is watching for your inaction. AOC wants you to ignore this email. [_It's easy to help, just click the link below to download and print nomination papers!_](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-r/) [>> DOWNLOAD NOMINATION PAPERS HERE <<](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-y/) [_You can also help us cover the costs of getting on the ballot by clicking here to donate!_](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-j/) I need all the help I can get to keep fighting for you in Washington, D.C.Thank you,
**Scott Fitzgerald** [Get Your Papers NOW](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-t/) [Help Cover the Costs of Getting on the Ballot!](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-h/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-k/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-u/) [](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-o/)[](https://fitzs-scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-qjdvld-yuhdluddtl-b/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Three donations of $5 from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we did
the math and we need just three more donations from 18326.
(We’ll explain more about why below.)

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-1770&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy ]Will you chip in $5 and be one of the three we need?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-1770&t=1002&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy ]CHIP IN $5 →

Peter,

Last week, our team learned that Rand Paul announced his highest
fundraising haul to date, bringing in millions of dollars in corporate
donations last quarter. Meaning, while he was ignoring Kentuckians and
spreading dangerous lies, Rand was collecting six-figure checks from
corporations, lobbyists, and other dark money sources.

It’s irrefutable evidence that there will be no expense spared in order to
try to attack Charles and protect Rand’s seat. They’re scared because they
realize a historic grassroots movement is rising up in Kentucky to turn
our Commonwealth blue.

So this month, we’re answering Rand’s dark money donations with a wave of
grassroots fundraising. Because we know that if regular folks come
together, Wall Street executives, Big Pharma, and Rand Paul won’t stand a
chance.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-1770&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy ]We’re getting close to the mid-point of the month, and we’re racing to
raise another $30,000 to fund our operating budget for the rest of the
month. We did the math and we need three $5 donations
from 18326 today. Will you chip in?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-1770&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy ]Contribute $5 →

Our people-powered movement has supporters from all across the country and
within Kentucky, who prove what we’ve known every step of the way —
Kentuckians are hungry for change.

We know that Kentucky can thrive when we lift up the voices of hardworking
people from the forgotten places, and build a new coalition of people from
the hood to the holler.

We know that we can redefine our politics by replacing the old Southern
Strategy with a new one that lifts love, common bonds, and democracy over
racism, hate, and division. We will ensure all Kentuckians have good
quality health care, financial freedom, community safety, and clean water.

We have a real chance to defeat Rand Paul this election, and send Charles
to the U.S. Senate to represent Kentucky. But if we want to do that, it’s
going to take all of us working together and chipping in what we can to
catch up to Rand’s war chest and truly compete.

Just three more donations from 18326 can get us to our goal of
$30,000 more raised before our mid-month deadline TONIGHT. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220415-2?refcode=em20220415-1770&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy ]Will you
donate $5 so we can build this grassroots movement and
usher in bold progressive leadership to Kentucky?

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220415-1770-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1770_346206_YKMpJy&akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1770%2E346206%2EYKMpJy

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

---
| | GREAT NEWS! A generous donor has stepped forward and says she will match every donation you send through the end of this weekend! That means if you send $100, I get $200 - and so on. Her one stipulation is that I spend that money on Portland broadcast TV commercials! We already have commercials running in the Bend and Medford broadcast markets, so this is an amazing opportunity.

I'm a 100% grassroots candidate up against candidates who are trying to buy this race by writing themselves $1 million checks. A candidate like that will lose the general election for us if they buy their way through the primary. It's a proven fact that our conservative base isn't excited enough by a candidate like this to even turn their ballots in.

I'm a VERY different kind of candidate! Which is exactly what we need.

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: Please Read Today → FW: Election Integrity At Risk
body:
This is very bad. We are fighting for election integrity, but our campaign to stop election fraud is about to come up perilously short of a critical budget deadline. We are still more than $2,000 short of funding this effort and we need to do so before midnight to avoid budget cuts.Please - I'm asking urgently, will you help? Here's a secure link to donate:[https://secure.winred.com/mark-mccloskey-for-missouri/email-fwd-election-integrity-at-risk](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-r/)I won't forget it if you come through for us today!Thank you,Mark McCloskey \---------Forwarded Message-------
From: **Mark McCloskey**
Date: Thurs, April. 14, 2022 at 12:00 PM
Subject: Election Integrity At Risk [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-y/) Friends, You already know that our elections are not secure. That's no secret to those of us that are paying attention.But our fight for election integrity is very much at risk right now. I've been fighting with Mike Lindell - who has endorsed my campaign from the very start - to secure our elections.[**But we have a huge financial deadline tomorrow, and we 're still $5,210 short of funding the budget we need to keep up the fight. **](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-j/)That's why I'm reaching out personally.We can't afford to have to close up our campaign at this critical moment in the fight. If we come up short, it might not just mean budget cuts, it could mean the whole project is derailed.I refuse to let that happen! So, please, will you chip in ASAP to help us fight for secure elections? [DONATE $10](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-t/) [DONATE $25](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-i/) [DONATE $100](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-d/) [DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-h/) Thank you in advance,Mark McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-o/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-b/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-n/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-p/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyjrjhuy-9A790A88-bjututkitk-m) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyjrjhuy-bjututkitk-c/)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60142714:JJezcEopN:m:1:3317145305:3AFB8C158BF18F8327071A9644210DE8:r)

Peter,
On Sunday, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out of touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**
**[Can you help me to punch back and continue to fight against the radical Left and the dishonest corporate media? Rush in $50, $25, or $15 now>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60142714:JJezcEopN:m:1:3317145305:3AFB8C158BF18F8327071A9644210DE8:r "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/hollywoke-punches-florida-hf")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[DONATE NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60142714:JJezcEopN:m:1:3317145305:3AFB8C158BF18F8327071A9644210DE8:r)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Biden Dog Attack Scandal!
body:
Biden Border Crisis!

[INSIDE JW]

JUDICIAL WATCH TEAM OBSERVES HUNGARY ELECTIONS – AS LEFT SWARMS!

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27132&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj11R2N1ZWxXWk13TSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
Viktor Orbán, Hungary’s national-conservative prime minister,
won
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27133&F=T&]
a fourth consecutive term on April 3 against, in his words, the
“overwhelming force” of “the left at home, the international
left all around, the Brussels bureaucrats, the [George] Soros empire
with all its money, the international mainstream media ...”

We were there with a six-member team to observe election day
procedures. It concluded
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27099&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2h1bmdhcnktZWxlY3Rpb24tbW9uaXRvcmluZy1yZXBvcnQtMjAyMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that the administration of the vote on election day was efficient,
orderly, and unremarkable.

The team was led by attorneys who previously worked for the Department
of Justice’s Voting Section monitoring state and federal elections
in the United States. The team also included lawyers who had monitored
elections for us.

Our representatives observed voting in 52 precincts at 27 locations in
and around Budapest. The team did not observe any meaningful problems
throughout the day. Despite a high national turnout rate approaching
70%, lines were usually brief and only rarely exceeded 15 minutes. The
Hungarian electoral practice of including representatives of every
party of any size at each voter registration desk appears to have
contributed to a low-controversy environment. In some ways, according
to the team’s report, the administration of the vote was more
effective, and less chaotic, than what team members had observed in
previous elections in parts of the United States.

Our monitoring methodology emphasizes ballot access, meaning the
ability of citizens to easily register and cast an equal vote in an
election. It particularly focuses on recording specific election say
problems concerning unlawful electioneering, arbitrary variations in
the rules for voting, aggressive voting assistance, unusual ballot
handling, voter intimidation or confrontations, and voter “turn
aways.”

Our methodology contrasted with the approach adopted by other
international observers, who often criticized the Hungarian elections
based on value judgments about matters like media bias, negative
campaigning, campaign finance policy, and the prevalence of women
candidates. Our report stated that these “are matters more
appropriately addressed by editorial boards, not election monitoring
teams.”

The transnational Left swarmed Hungary to create controversy about the
election of their ideological opponent, Viktor Orban. By contrast, our
expert election observer team found virtually no issues in the conduct
of the elections.

BIDEN’S DOG ATTACKED AGENTS MULTIPLE TIMES; ONE COMPLAINED OF
COVERUP

You'll recall that in August 2021 we uncovered records
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27101&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tZG9nLW1ham9yLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
from the Secret
Service revealing that President Joe Biden’s dog, Major, was
responsible for many more biting incidents than the Biden White House
had publicly acknowledged.

One email noted that “at the current rate an Agent or Officer has
been bitten every day this week (3/1-3/8) causing damage to attire or
bruising/punctures to the skin.”

This week we released 400 pages
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27100&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYmlkZW4tZG9ncy1yZWNvcmRzLTAyODI0LTIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
of new records, including incident reports, detailing multiple attacks
and damages to Secret Service members by the dog at both the White
House and Biden’s lake home in Wilmington, DE.

The documents also reveal that a Secret Service member who was
attacked by the dog was displeased that White House Press Secretary
Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident.

Major was given to family friends
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27117&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9hYmNuZXdzLmdvLmNvbS9Qb2xpdGljcy93aXJlU3RvcnkvYmlkZW4td2VsY29tZXMtcHVwcHktd2hpdGUtaG91c2Utd29yZC1wcm9taXNlZC1jYXQtODE4NjUyNzE/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
in December 2021, but not before causing considerable chaos in the
White House.

We obtained the documents in response to an October 2021 FOIA lawsuit
we filed after the Department of Homeland Security failed to respond
to a July 29, 2021, request (_Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of
Homeland Security_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27118&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtZGhzLWJpZGVuLWRvZ3MtY29tcGxhaW50LTAyODI0Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
(No. 1:21-cv-02824)) for:

* All records related to all dogs owned by the Bidens that have
lived at the White House, including communications sent to and from
USSS officials, and reports filed about dog bites and other
dog-related incidents.
* All medical and vaccination records for all dogs owned by the
Bidens that have lived at the White House.

In an email chain
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27103&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYmlkZW4tZG9ncy1yZWNvcmRzLTAyODI0LXBnLTI3Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
dated March 9, 2021, a member of the Presidential Protective Division
(PPD) expresses anger that White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki
lacked candor about the dog bite incident during a press briefing. The
chain begins when a fellow agent checks on the welfare of a colleague
asking, “You ok? Someone told me you got bit.”

The agent replies, “Yes I got bit by Major on [redacted] and NO I
didn’t surprise the dog doing my job by being at [redacted] as the
press secretary just said! Now I’m pissed. Thanks for checking
in.”

The initial agent replies, “SMH [shaking my head]... hope you
didn’t get hurt to bad. Take care.”

A Secret Service incident report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27104&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYmlkZW4tZG9ncy1yZWNvcmRzLTAyODI0LXBncy0yNDAtMjQyLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
concerning a dog attack on the morning of February 28, 2021, at the
Biden’s Wilmington, Delaware, lake home discloses the following:

At approximately 0900hrs, while working the AM shift for POTUS at the
Wilmington, DE Lake house, SA [redacted] was walking to relieve SA
[redacted] from the [redacted] location. SA [redacted] stated that
[redacted] observed Major running at SA [redacted] and heard him
yelling at the dog. At this point, SA [redacted] continued to walk
toward SA [redacted] location and saw Major had turned in [redacted]
direction running at high speed. SA [redacted] once more heard SA
[redacted] yell, “Major stop!” before [redacted] turned around to
avoid a direct attack. Upon turning [redacted] was struck on
[redacted] right thigh by the dog’s mouth. Major then ran across the
yard towards the opposite end of the house. SA [redacted] was shaken
from this encounter, having almost been bitten, therefore SA
[redacted] held the [redacted] with [redacted] until Major had been
brought back into the residence. SA [redacted] did not seek medical
attention for this incident.
The report has a footnote regarding a photo taken a week after the
attack, showing “a bruise where Major’s mouth impacted [redacted]
leg. The oval shape of injury demonstrates the outline of the dog’s
closed jaws.”

In an email dated June 24, 2021, regarding the February 28 incident, a
Secret Service official writes: “I have taken the liberty of adding
the Uniformed Division to this email chain as I understand there have
been multiple bite/attack incidents involving Major and their
officers.”

In a May 11, 2021, email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27110&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYmlkZW4tZG9ncy1yZWNvcmRzLTAyODI0LXBncy0xNzEtMTc1Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==],
a Secret Service agent describes the dog bite incident and is
criticized for adding the additional details:

I have attached yet another revision to the SSF3361. In hindsight, I
agree that the brief description of the nature of the dog bite damage
to my wool overcoat was lacking in sufficient details.

I included the following as well as the language you felt at liberty
to provide:

“On the evening of March 6th 2021 I was working an evening shift at
the White House as per my usual duties. While leading the President
and First Lady back from the Tennis pavilion to the Residence, Major,
the younger of the First Family’s two dogs, was [redacted] the First
Lady in the Diplomatic Reception Room. As Major came around the
corner, he attacked me unprovoked, tearing the wool overcoat I was
wearing that evening. This attack occurred through no fault of my own
and I could not avoid this unusual circumstance due to the nature and
requirements of my position.”
After providing the additional details, the agent is admonished for
providing too much detail, with another official telling him,
“Please submit with the language that has been approved by LEG
[legal office]. Unless you dispute anything in the verbiage that was
presented to you, there shouldn't be a need to embellish with
additional details that aren't required for approval.”

That official’s email is forwarded with criticism of the additional
detail, “SA [redacted] verbiage was deemed excessively detailed and
inappropriate. I was asked to have him submit with the language that
has already been approved by LEG [legal office]. Not sure if he will
or not. I don’t think it’s about the money anymore.”

The recipient replies, “Thank you Sir. To limit distribution, I will

The documents also reveal significant back and forth regarding
reimbursement of a USSS agents’ clothing that was damaged by Major.

In an email
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27116&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtc2VjcmV0LXNlcnZpY2UtYmlkZW4tZG9ncy1yZWNvcmRzLTAyODI0LXBncy0zNjItMzc4Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==]
dated July 14, 2021, the agent rescinds his request for reimbursement
for the damaged coat, advising officials that the Biden family, not
taxpayers, should be responsible for the reimbursement:

After some deep thought and reflection, I don’t believe the USSS
should be responsible for the damage to my coat as the cause was not
under their control. To be compensated in this manner would
essentially have the cost borne by the tax payer and this would be
unjust.

As I read the email chain below, this incident should be treated as a
“tort claim”. I believe this is accurate and as such, the
responsibility should lie with the party responsible for the wrong
doing (i.e. tort), and that of course would be the dog owner/s.

Therefore, I’d like to formally withdraw my [reimbursement] claim
for the 3361.
These documents show Major was a dangerous dog, placing Secret
Service and other White House personnel at needless risk, and the
Biden White House lied about it. It seems that Secret Service
management seemed more concerned about managing press relations than
taking care of its agents. In fact, the agency is still withholding
information about this mess!

MEXICAN CARTELS FLY 9,000 DRONE FLIGHTS INTO U.S. TO SURVEIL LAW
ENFORCEMENT

Our southwest border is a war zone, with the Mexican drug cartels
using the latest technology to do their dirty work in the United
States. We are on the ground covering this daily warfare, and our
_Corruption Chronicles_ blog has the latest
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27119&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvY2FydGVscy1mbHktZHJvbmVzLWludG8tdXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz].

Mexican drug cartels have conducted more than 9,000 drone flights into
U.S. airspace in the last year to surveil American law enforcement and
security operations in the southern border region, a senior Homeland
Security official told Judicial Watch this week. The drones are
observing federal, state, county, and city agencies near the Mexican
border, including the U.S. Border Patrol, Texas Department of Public
Safety, Texas National Guard, county sheriffs and local police. The
Border Patrol, which operates under Customs and Border Protection
(CBP), has captured about a dozen of the drones, and accessed the
Unmanned Aerial Vehicles’ (UAVs) guidance and memory systems to gain
intelligence information, according to a high-level official at the
agency.

Judicial Watch learned about the Mexican cartel drone incursions
during a recent visit to the southern border and specifically while
interviewing federal officials at the CBP Rio Grande Valley sector in
Texas. Judicial Watch is further investigating the matter and has
filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with CBP, the
60,000-member agency charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons
out of the U.S., for all records regarding the use of drones by
criminal organizations operating along the U.S.-Mexico border for the
purpose of surveilling U.S. law enforcement officials or otherwise
facilitating illegal activity. The federal public-record request
includes, but is not limited to, all information depicting the known
or estimated number of instances of the use of such technology, as
well as all reports, intelligence assessments, analyses, or similar
records related to their use.

Federal officials on the ground tell Judicial Watch that the cartels
use the UAV surveillance flights to facilitate human smuggling and
drug trafficking. Specifically, they help identify gaps in border
coverage and assist the cartels in overwhelming certain areas to
create a diversion for moving sensitive or high value loads through
alternate border locations. The data analyzed from the confiscated
drones has also provided U.S. authorities with other law-enforcement
sensitive information that cannot be made public, government sources
said, adding that drug cartels started using the devices a few years
ago. Brandon Judd, the president of the union representing the
nation’s 20,000 Border Patrol agents, told Judicial Watch the drones
are also used to smuggle small amounts of drugs into the U.S. “They
are dropping fentanyl,” Judd said this week. “They fly into
certain locations, drop them to the ground and fentanyl is taken off
of them and they take back off into Mexico.” The drones are not
military grade, Judd confirmed, but rather “run of the mill” that
can be purchased anywhere.

Reports of Mexican cartels using UAVs to enhance their illicit
operations began surfacing within the last few years. In fact, three
years ago agents in the El Paso sector around 750 miles from the Rio
Grande Valley revealed in a news report
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27134&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYnJlaXRiYXJ0LmNvbS9ib3JkZXIvMjAxOS8wNC8xOC9tZXhpY2FuLWNhcnRlbHMtdXNlLWRyb25lcy10by1zY291dC1taWdyYW50LXNtdWdnbGluZy1sYW5lcy1zYXktZmVkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=]
that they had witnessed what they believed to be the first use of a
drone by a Mexican cartel to act as a “look-out.” In the story CBP
officials from the El Paso sector are quoted saying that agents
“discovered a new tactic in counter surveillance,” referring to
the UAV. An agent monitoring the border with an infrared camera
discovered the drone traveling north into the U.S. from Mexico, the
article states. Last year Mexico’s largest newspaper reported
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27135&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZWx1bml2ZXJzYWwuY29tLm14L25hY2lvbi9kcm9uZXMtY29uZmlybWEtc2FuZG92YWwtYXRhcXVlLWxhcy1mdWVyemFzLWFybWFkYXMtZW4tamFsaXNjby1ndWFuYWp1YXRvLXktbWljaG9hY2FuP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz]
that some of the country’s most notorious cartels, including Jalisco
Nueva Generación, used drones with explosives to attack police in the
western part of the country. Back in 2018, an academic study
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=58641&L=27136&F=T&]
found that cartels use drones to look for Border Patrol agents and
inform drug smugglers of their positions. The research focused on the
complex security landscape of military drones for border security and
non-state actors with sharply diverging motives to develop their own
drone surveillance capacities.

HAPPY EASTER!

_“We are an Easter People and Alleluia is our song!” – Pope John
Paul, II._

Christians around the world are celebrating the resurrection of the
Christ. There are no more powerful symbols of hope than the cross and
the empty tomb. From me and mine, I wish you and yours all the joy of
Easter! Passover happily coincides with Easter this year – so, Happy
Passover, as well!

Until next week ...

clean_body: Biden Border Crisis! [INSIDE JW] JUDICIAL WATCH TEAM OBSERVES HUNGARY ELECTIONS – AS LEFT SWARMS! [==] Viktor Orbán, Hungary’s national-conservative prime minister, won [=] a fourth consecutive term on April 3 against, in his words, the “overwhelming force” of “the left at home, the international left all around, the Brussels bureaucrats, the [George] Soros empire with all its money, the international mainstream media ...” We were there with a six-member team to observe election day procedures. It concluded [=] that the administration of the vote on election day was efficient, orderly, and unremarkable. The team was led by attorneys who previously worked for the Department of Justice’s Voting Section monitoring state and federal elections in the United States. The team also included lawyers who had monitored elections for us. Our representatives observed voting in 52 precincts at 27 locations in and around Budapest. The team did not observe any meaningful problems throughout the day. Despite a high national turnout rate approaching 70%, lines were usually brief and only rarely exceeded 15 minutes. The Hungarian electoral practice of including representatives of every party of any size at each voter registration desk appears to have contributed to a low-controversy environment. In some ways, according to the team’s report, the administration of the vote was more effective, and less chaotic, than what team members had observed in previous elections in parts of the United States. Our monitoring methodology emphasizes ballot access, meaning the ability of citizens to easily register and cast an equal vote in an election. It particularly focuses on recording specific election say problems concerning unlawful electioneering, arbitrary variations in the rules for voting, aggressive voting assistance, unusual ballot handling, voter intimidation or confrontations, and voter “turn aways.” Our methodology contrasted with the approach adopted by other international observers, who often criticized the Hungarian elections based on value judgments about matters like media bias, negative campaigning, campaign finance policy, and the prevalence of women candidates. Our report stated that these “are matters more appropriately addressed by editorial boards, not election monitoring teams.” The transnational Left swarmed Hungary to create controversy about the election of their ideological opponent, Viktor Orban. By contrast, our expert election observer team found virtually no issues in the conduct of the elections. BIDEN’S DOG ATTACKED AGENTS MULTIPLE TIMES; ONE COMPLAINED OF COVERUP You'll recall that in August 2021 we uncovered records [==] from the Secret Service revealing that President Joe Biden’s dog, Major, was responsible for many more biting incidents than the Biden White House had publicly acknowledged. One email noted that “at the current rate an Agent or Officer has been bitten every day this week (3/1-3/8) causing damage to attire or bruising/punctures to the skin.” This week we released 400 pages [] of new records, including incident reports, detailing multiple attacks and damages to Secret Service members by the dog at both the White House and Biden’s lake home in Wilmington, DE. The documents also reveal that a Secret Service member who was attacked by the dog was displeased that White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki misled the press about the incident. Major was given to family friends [=] in December 2021, but not before causing considerable chaos in the White House. We obtained the documents in response to an October 2021 FOIA lawsuit we filed after the Department of Homeland Security failed to respond to a July 29, 2021, request (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Homeland Security [==] (No. 1:21-cv-02824)) for: All records related to all dogs owned by the Bidens that have lived at the White House, including communications sent to and from USSS officials, and reports filed about dog bites and other dog-related incidents. All medical and vaccination records for all dogs owned by the Bidens that have lived at the White House. In an email chain [==] dated March 9, 2021, a member of the Presidential Protective Division (PPD) expresses anger that White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki lacked candor about the dog bite incident during a press briefing. The chain begins when a fellow agent checks on the welfare of a colleague asking, “You ok? Someone told me you got bit.” The agent replies, “Yes I got bit by Major on [redacted] and NO I didn’t surprise the dog doing my job by being at [redacted] as the press secretary just said! Now I’m pissed. Thanks for checking in.” The initial agent replies, “SMH [shaking my head]... hope you didn’t get hurt to bad. Take care.” A Secret Service incident report [==] concerning a dog attack on the morning of February 28, 2021, at the Biden’s Wilmington, Delaware, lake home discloses the following: At approximately 0900hrs, while working the AM shift for POTUS at the Wilmington, DE Lake house, SA [redacted] was walking to relieve SA [redacted] from the [redacted] location. SA [redacted] stated that [redacted] observed Major running at SA [redacted] and heard him yelling at the dog. At this point, SA [redacted] continued to walk toward SA [redacted] location and saw Major had turned in [redacted] direction running at high speed. SA [redacted] once more heard SA [redacted] yell, “Major stop!” before [redacted] turned around to avoid a direct attack. Upon turning [redacted] was struck on [redacted] right thigh by the dog’s mouth. Major then ran across the yard towards the opposite end of the house. SA [redacted] was shaken from this encounter, having almost been bitten, therefore SA [redacted] held the [redacted] with [redacted] until Major had been brought back into the residence. SA [redacted] did not seek medical attention for this incident. The report has a footnote regarding a photo taken a week after the attack, showing “a bruise where Major’s mouth impacted [redacted] leg. The oval shape of injury demonstrates the outline of the dog’s closed jaws.” In an email dated June 24, 2021, regarding the February 28 incident, a Secret Service official writes: “I have taken the liberty of adding the Uniformed Division to this email chain as I understand there have been multiple bite/attack incidents involving Major and their officers.” A separate incident report [==] concerning another dog attack on the evening of February 28, 2021, at the Biden’s Wilmington, Delaware lake home notes: At approximately 1900hrs, while working the PM shift for POTUS at the Wilmington DE Lake house, SA [redacted] was [redacted] of the residence. SA [redacted] observed POTUS Biden walk up to the front door with the elder family dog Champ. SA [redacted] stated that POTUS [redacted]. After several minutes of waiting, Major failed to appear and POTUS took Champ inside closing the door behind him. Almost immediately after the door had shut, SA [redacted] observed Major running at [redacted] full stride from the main driveway. SA [redacted] quickly made an effort to seek shelter inside [redacted]. Despite the attempt, Major intercepted SA [redacted] and bit down on [redacted] left forearm. SA [redacted] quickly shook Major off of [redacted] arm and once more attempted to [redacted] to avoid further attack. In so doing, SA [redacted] briefly turned [redacted] back on Major and the dog bit [redacted] a second time on the right buttock. Fortunately, despite the two injuries, SA [redacted] was able to [redacted], separating [redacted] self from the animal. Approximately 15 minutes after this attack, POTUS Biden opened the front door to let Major into the residence. At this point, SA [redacted] stated the dog then went inside and POTUS [redacted]. SA [redacted], shaken by the ordeal, took a relief push to inspect [redacted] injury at the [redacted]. He then [redacted] and finished the remainder of [redacted] shift despite the discomfort. A footnote indicates photos were attached: The images attached were taken on the date of SA [redacted] injury (02/28/21) and shows a puncture mark [redacted]. The second image is a picture of the rain jacket SA [redacted] was wearing the evening of 02/28/21, which Major bit through causing the puncture.... As of this date, [redacted] has not been compensated for the injury or damage to [redacted] jacket. A second footnote points out: “NOTE – The attack on SA [redacted] occurred less than 12 hours after the first attack on SA [redacted].” An incident report [==] stemming from a March 6, 2021, dog attack discloses the following: As the dog came around the corner from the diplomatic room [of the White House], he [Major] locked eyes with SA [redacted]. SA [redacted] having been a [redacted] his entire life, knew from this moment of eye contact with Major that something serious was about to go down. Major advanced on SA [redacted] and quickened pace in the final 10ft of distance. The dog then attempted to bite SA [redacted] left arm but was only able to lock teeth on his overcoat as he stepped aside from the attack. The First Lady [redacted]; however the coat was torn during the altercation. The President witnessed the First Lady [redacted] and [redacted] before moving the entire party onto the residence elevator. A photo is attached to the email, and a footnote in the email reads: “The image attached was taken approximately one month after the attack and shows the severity of the bite through SA [redacted] wool overcoat. (The overcoat is valued at >$500. As of this date, SA [redacted] has not been compensated for the damage.)” A Secret Service incident report [==] concerning a dog attack on the morning of March 8, 2021, at the White House discloses the following: At approximately 0700hrs, while working the AM shift for POTUS at the White House, SA [redacted] was positioned at the 2nd Floor [redacted] in the residence. Around this same time, the First Lady [redacted] to the 2nd floor residence. Without warning or provocation, Major barked loudly at SA [redacted] and charged at [redacted]. Having no time to seek cover from the attack, SA [redacted] turned away from the dog as he bit into [redacted] right leg. The First Lady [redacted]. The First Lady then [redacted] into the residence elevator and down to the ground floor [redacted]. ATSAIC [assistant to the special agent-in-charge] [redacted]. [Redacted] immediate supervisor, heard the barking from the ground floor and immediately came to the 2nd floor post to check on SA [redacted] status. He instructed [redacted] to take a picture of the injury and seek medical evaluation from the White House doctor on the ground floor. At approximately 0800, the White House nurse on duty [redacted]. Despite all this, [redacted] managed to complete the remainder of [redacted] shift even with [redacted] on [redacted] right leg. A footnote indicates that photos, which were redacted, are attached, and states: “SA [redacted] injury cannot be described in any other term than ‘severe’. [Redacted] is the only known PPD agent to have suffered two attacks from Major in less than 10 days. (As of this date, [redacted] has received no compensation for either injury.” A Secret Service email [=] concerning a dog attack on the morning of May 12, 2021, at the White House discloses the following: On May 12th, 2021 around 630-645am. The First Lady brought Major down to take him outside before movement to an in town site. The First Lady and the Usher were standing next to me at [redacted] along with a [redacted]. I was standing back against the wall as to leave space for the First Lady and Major who was on a leash. Out of nowhere the dog jumps and bites the sleeve of my suit jacket missing my arm (front teeth just scratching the top of the skin). As I lift my arm up the dog was still attached to my suit jacket and the First Lady was attempting to pull the dog off of me via the leash. Once the dog let go, the First Lady ran into the Dip[lomatic Reception] room with the dog. The usher came out to see how I was. Later [redacted] said the First Lady [redacted]. SAIC Cho was at my post 20 min later to check on my well-being. In a memo [=] prepared by Secret Service management regarding a May 13, 2021, meeting several managers had with the Secret Service agent who was attacked by Major on March 6, one of the officials “explained the delicateness of the situation, in terms of potential damage in the trust of our protectees.” Mr. [Redacted] also stated that based on the most recent bite incident he was unwilling to change the verbiage on the official SSF 3361 [reimbursement form]. Mr. [Redacted] further stated this incident was one of many of negative aspects of [Presidential Protection Division] he and other Agents are dealing with. Mr. [Redacted] stated the dangerous atmosphere surrounding Major needs to be documented and henceforth, he would serve as a depository to document all past and future incidents. In a May 11, 2021, email [==], a Secret Service agent describes the dog bite incident and is criticized for adding the additional details: I have attached yet another revision to the SSF3361. In hindsight, I agree that the brief description of the nature of the dog bite damage to my wool overcoat was lacking in sufficient details. I included the following as well as the language you felt at liberty to provide: “On the evening of March 6th 2021 I was working an evening shift at the White House as per my usual duties. While leading the President and First Lady back from the Tennis pavilion to the Residence, Major, the younger of the First Family’s two dogs, was [redacted] the First Lady in the Diplomatic Reception Room. As Major came around the corner, he attacked me unprovoked, tearing the wool overcoat I was wearing that evening. This attack occurred through no fault of my own and I could not avoid this unusual circumstance due to the nature and requirements of my position.” After providing the additional details, the agent is admonished for providing too much detail, with another official telling him, “Please submit with the language that has been approved by LEG [legal office]. Unless you dispute anything in the verbiage that was presented to you, there shouldn't be a need to embellish with additional details that aren't required for approval.” That official’s email is forwarded with criticism of the additional detail, “SA [redacted] verbiage was deemed excessively detailed and inappropriate. I was asked to have him submit with the language that has already been approved by LEG [legal office]. Not sure if he will or not. I don’t think it’s about the money anymore.” In a March 1, 2021, Secret Service “PPD [Presidential Protective Division] Supervisors Meeting Notes” memo [], one bullet entry under the heading “SAIC CHO” [then-Special Agent-in-Charge David Cho] reads “First Family Pet Behavior.” In a March 5, 2021, email [], a redacted Secret Service official advises White House officials: For your awareness, WHMU [White House Medical Unit] responded to the South Portico a short time ago on a UDW (Uniformed Division White House) report of a pass holder with a dog bite. The pass holder is [redacted] of the Residence staff. He is currently being treated in the Doctor’s office. In an email [=] chain dated March 8, 2021, with the subject line “Family Pet,” Cho contacts unidentified White House officials to advise them of a dog attack: For your awareness, Major bit one of the agents this morning. The agent is ok, but does have bruising and a puncture. [Redacted]’s at the EEOB [Eisenhower Executive Office Building] clinic getting it tended to. [Redacted] Additionally, we have noticed Major getting more aggressive lately. We have extended the offer of our K9 trainer (RTC Training Facility) to help train Major. An official in the Office of the First Lady replies, “She [redacted]. The dogs are en route Delaware.” Cho replies, “Thank you, sir. Would like to follow up with you sometime this week.” The official replies, “Always available to you. If easier, Mr. [redacted] can find time for us.” Another White House official responds, “I will join as well.” The Office of the First Lady replies, “What if it’s private and doesn’t include you? <wink emoji>” “Duly noted,” the White House official responds. In an email [==] dated March 9, 2021, with the subject line “Supervisor’s Meeting Notes,” a redacted Secret Service official advises other agents about the press coverage: Family pets are both in Wilmington. Younger pet bit a Shift SA [special agent] yesterday. Staff/first family are getting him a full time trainer to correct his behavior in Wilmington.... The biting incident is in the news now (Google it). Just another reminder that the press is always looking for a story. Maintain awareness of your conversations and social media presence. We do not want and cannot have a press lead attributed to us. In an email [==] dated March 16, 2021, an assistant to the special agent-in-charge writes to a supervisory program manager in the Presidential Protective Division regarding a reimbursement request for a torn special agent’s overcoat, noting: “This is reimbursement of an article of clothing that was damaged by a family pet. Sending this to you direct to limit distribution.” The recipient replies, “Thank you Sir. To limit distribution, I will handle this directly with [redacted] in Budget for reimbursement.” The documents also reveal significant back and forth regarding reimbursement of a USSS agents’ clothing that was damaged by Major. In an email [==] dated July 14, 2021, the agent rescinds his request for reimbursement for the damaged coat, advising officials that the Biden family, not taxpayers, should be responsible for the reimbursement: After some deep thought and reflection, I don’t believe the USSS should be responsible for the damage to my coat as the cause was not under their control. To be compensated in this manner would essentially have the cost borne by the tax payer and this would be unjust. As I read the email chain below, this incident should be treated as a “tort claim”. I believe this is accurate and as such, the responsibility should lie with the party responsible for the wrong doing (i.e. tort), and that of course would be the dog owner/s. Therefore, I’d like to formally withdraw my [reimbursement] claim for the 3361. These documents show Major was a dangerous dog, placing Secret Service and other White House personnel at needless risk, and the Biden White House lied about it. It seems that Secret Service management seemed more concerned about managing press relations than taking care of its agents. In fact, the agency is still withholding information about this mess! MEXICAN CARTELS FLY 9,000 DRONE FLIGHTS INTO U.S. TO SURVEIL LAW ENFORCEMENT Our southwest border is a war zone, with the Mexican drug cartels using the latest technology to do their dirty work in the United States. We are on the ground covering this daily warfare, and our Corruption Chronicles blog has the latest []. Mexican drug cartels have conducted more than 9,000 drone flights into U.S. airspace in the last year to surveil American law enforcement and security operations in the southern border region, a senior Homeland Security official told Judicial Watch this week. The drones are observing federal, state, county, and city agencies near the Mexican border, including the U.S. Border Patrol, Texas Department of Public Safety, Texas National Guard, county sheriffs and local police. The Border Patrol, which operates under Customs and Border Protection (CBP), has captured about a dozen of the drones, and accessed the Unmanned Aerial Vehicles’ (UAVs) guidance and memory systems to gain intelligence information, according to a high-level official at the agency. Judicial Watch learned about the Mexican cartel drone incursions during a recent visit to the southern border and specifically while interviewing federal officials at the CBP Rio Grande Valley sector in Texas. Judicial Watch is further investigating the matter and has filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request with CBP, the 60,000-member agency charged with keeping terrorists and their weapons out of the U.S., for all records regarding the use of drones by criminal organizations operating along the U.S.-Mexico border for the purpose of surveilling U.S. law enforcement officials or otherwise facilitating illegal activity. The federal public-record request includes, but is not limited to, all information depicting the known or estimated number of instances of the use of such technology, as well as all reports, intelligence assessments, analyses, or similar records related to their use. Federal officials on the ground tell Judicial Watch that the cartels use the UAV surveillance flights to facilitate human smuggling and drug trafficking. Specifically, they help identify gaps in border coverage and assist the cartels in overwhelming certain areas to create a diversion for moving sensitive or high value loads through alternate border locations. The data analyzed from the confiscated drones has also provided U.S. authorities with other law-enforcement sensitive information that cannot be made public, government sources said, adding that drug cartels started using the devices a few years ago. Brandon Judd, the president of the union representing the nation’s 20,000 Border Patrol agents, told Judicial Watch the drones are also used to smuggle small amounts of drugs into the U.S. “They are dropping fentanyl,” Judd said this week. “They fly into certain locations, drop them to the ground and fentanyl is taken off of them and they take back off into Mexico.” The drones are not military grade, Judd confirmed, but rather “run of the mill” that can be purchased anywhere. Reports of Mexican cartels using UAVs to enhance their illicit operations began surfacing within the last few years. In fact, three years ago agents in the El Paso sector around 750 miles from the Rio Grande Valley revealed in a news report [=] that they had witnessed what they believed to be the first use of a drone by a Mexican cartel to act as a “look-out.” In the story CBP officials from the El Paso sector are quoted saying that agents “discovered a new tactic in counter surveillance,” referring to the UAV. An agent monitoring the border with an infrared camera discovered the drone traveling north into the U.S. from Mexico, the article states. Last year Mexico’s largest newspaper reported [] that some of the country’s most notorious cartels, including Jalisco Nueva Generación, used drones with explosives to attack police in the western part of the country. Back in 2018, an academic study [] found that cartels use drones to look for Border Patrol agents and inform drug smugglers of their positions. The research focused on the complex security landscape of military drones for border security and non-state actors with sharply diverging motives to develop their own drone surveillance capacities. HAPPY EASTER! “We are an Easter People and Alleluia is our song!” – Pope John Paul, II. Christians around the world are celebrating the resurrection of the Christ. There are no more powerful symbols of hope than the cross and the empty tomb. From me and mine, I wish you and yours all the joy of Easter! Passover happily coincides with Easter this year – so, Happy Passover, as well! Until next week ... | Jim and his family lost power recently.Luckily for Jim and his loved ones, he was prepared with a Patriot Power Generator – a "next generation" solar generator that's powerful, portable, safe, silent, and 100% no fumes._**Jim declares that this 1-of-a-kind generator is "worth its weight in GOLD."**_**[See the #1 solar generator in action (and get one before they're gone)](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-AL2h4Q)** Here's what happened to Jim, and how he "powered through" when his world went dark..._"Last Friday we had a freak lightning storm hit taking down the local power. The Electric Co. had no estimate as to when the power would be back up.__I pulled out my Patriot Power Generator and immediately connected my fridge, a light, and 4 cell phones and kept them charged.__The power was restored after 6 hours. I left the Patriot Power Generator running to see how far it would go. It ran for another 7 hours before the low charge alarm started sounding.__My family was very impressed. Thank you for a wonderful, easy to use product."_ With unpredictable weather going on all across the country, it might be time to ask yourself if you're prepared to handle a blackout like Jim.Because for the first time in months (and after selling out multiple times in a row) we have the Patriot Power Generator, our most in-demand product, back in stock.The little workhorse of a generator is so popular...**We even had a waiting list last time we sold out – __thousands__ of names long.**You'll have more than enough robust power for your phones, tablets, laptops, small appliances, medical devices, lights, and more (including the ability to cycle your fridge and freezer).The Patriot Power Generator weighs a mere 38 pounds and can go just about anywhere. Plus, there's no dangerous fossil fuels or fumes to worry about.No noise to attract unwanted attention from looters or criminals. No flammable propane to fret about, either.Your generator arrives fully assembled and charged, too. So you can start using it right away. It's simple to operate, too – no complicated instructions to fuss over.And, you don't have to wait for an emergency to test it out. Take it on your next outdoor adventure or tailgate party. The ways you can enjoy your generator are unlimited.So if want to get your hands on one, you'll need to jump on this and get yours today.You'll sleep better at night... knowing you're prepared if the power goes out.**[>> See what all the hoopla is about, and to get your own Patriot Power Generator](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-S71Zg)**

subject: Hollywoke Punches Florida
body:
[****](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60142617:6lg1JEoNY:m:1:3253819041:97F9A2204D6A749697D82B7D5B4DDB09:r)

Peter,
On Sunday, Florida was again the Left's favorite punching bag as out-of-touch Hollywood elites continued their smears against me.
But I can tell you this, if Hollywood is attacking you, you must be doing something right.
I wish I could say I was surprised to see spoiled Hollywood hypocrites lecture parents about what is best for their children, but sadly their willingness to lie, distort and distract is par for the course. _**Their dishonesty knows no bounds. **_
_**If the same Hollywood elites who upheld degenerates like Harvey Weinstein now oppose our efforts to protect parental rights, I wear that like a badge of honor. **_
Rest assured - I'm not worried about what out of touch "entertainers" have to say, and I'm certainly not going to be intimidated by people who don't live in reality. **And the chances of me backing down to Disney-owned ABC or the low-rated Oscars is precisely zero. No amount of sloganeering from the liberal machine will change that.**
Despite these baseless charges from Hollywoke and the legacy media, I was proud to sign the Parental Rights in Education Bill to ensure that children K - 3 are not taught R-rated content in their G-rated years.
Peter, I will always stand up for parents and families and for what's right. **I 'm not backing down.**

After TWO ENTIRE YEARS, radical Democrats in blue states are “suddenly” coming around to ending lockdowns, mandates, and masking kids in schools. They claimed the science changed...
**But let me say this loud and clear: the science didn’t change -- THE POLITICS DID!**
