name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: Big wins, real results – How we are achieving change
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bigwins?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

When I crossed the Atlantic to join the Mississippi Center for Public Policy, I did so because I wanted to help achieve fundamental change.

During the legislative session that just ended, we certainly saw some big wins - as I discussed in this interview with Y’All Politics [HERE](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=82327c3bfd&e=5703353baa)[:](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e89bb9ff30&e=5703353baa)
* **A law to combat Critical Race Theory:**

This was our number one goal, and we accomplished it. The model bill we published just before the start of the legislative session is now law. It is no longer legal to use public money to compel students to believe that one group of Americans are inherently superior or inferior to other Americans.

For years, radical progressives have imposed their agenda. Not any longer. Other states have now adopted the approach that we have taken here, following our example.

* **The largest tax cut in Mississippi’s history**

Our second goal for this legislative session was to begin to eliminate the state income tax. Governor Tate Reeves signed into law the largest cut in tax in Mississippi’s history. It might not be full elimination, but the moral case for elimination has been won.
---
|
---
| **This tax cut is not merely a reduction in the state income tax. It is a tipping point for our state. **

For as long as anyone can remember, Mississippi’s political establishment has been in the business of soliciting handouts from Washington. If federal subsidies generated wealth, Mississippi would be the richest state in the Union. But we aren’t.

Instead, Mississippi is one of the poorest states in America. **Welfare dependency for a state is like welfare dependency for a household or family. Rather than alleviate poverty, it perpetuates it.**

The cut in state income tax reflects a change in thinking. Instead of merely looking to Washington to provide handouts, our state leadership is seeking to make our state more entrepreneurial and competitive.

Our wins in the 2022 session convince me that big change is possible, but that change only happens when it is grounded firmly in conservative principles and when we take our message of change to a mass audience. That is exactly what we have been doing.

**As Mississippi’s free market think tank, we do more than just have ideas. We make change happen by influencing how people throughout our state think. **We have carefully and painstakingly built up a mass audience:
* **Over 85,000 Mississippians subscribe to our weekly newsletter,**
* **Each week we are capable of reaching almost a quarter of a million Americans.**

**No other conservative organization in our state has the audience or the reach that we now have from Corinth to the Coast. **I also travel in person across the state to make the case for liberty – like I did last week when I was in Vicksburg.
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=7b5117a891&e=5703353baa)
---
What makes American exceptional?
|
What we do as Mississippi’s conservative think tank is only possible because of your support.

---
| |
---
Thank you - and have a wonderful Easter!

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
Ps. I have put down roots in my new home in Mississippi. Literally. Here is my vegetable patch – tomatoes and potatoes coming along nicely .....
---
|
---
| |
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e1a21d1702) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=e1a21d1702).

_Copyright © 2022 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._

name: Marisa Wood
subject: I call BS on McCarthy's whining about inflation.
body:
| _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212205/340580709/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQyZmE4ZC1hNGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYTyBdLnCaLhv65XXu24b9RWNAi4GMZ1JuxWzSjgkTs=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/c54238b1-26bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/85d2fa8d-a4bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQyZmE4ZC1hNGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYTyBdLnCaLhv65XXu24b9RWNAi4GMZ1JuxWzSjgkTs=&id=124172018)._ **[Friend, this is a long but important email about the community I serve and why I'm running to unseat GOP leader Kevin McCarthy. I hope you'll take a moment to read it, then chip in $3 to support my campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212206/340580710/-674430938?refcode=em-4.15.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQyZmE4ZC1hNGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYTyBdLnCaLhv65XXu24b9RWNAi4GMZ1JuxWzSjgkTs=)**

I've been a public school teacher for 20 years here in the Central Valley.

For many parents, taking their kids to school is a daily reminder of the struggle to make ends meet. Prices have shot up, and basics like housing and food are taking up a bigger share of the budget.

I was encouraged when Democrats passed anti-poverty legislation like the expanded Child Tax Credit. That extra money went a long way for the kiddos I teach. But the Child Tax Credit ended in December -- leaving our kids in need of support at the worst possible time.

Here's the blunt truth:

**Rather than find a way to see the long-term savings and benefit of giving families a hand up, McCarthy would rather blame families for inflation and needing the Child Tax Credit in the first place. It's sickening, and frankly, it's total B.S.**

How some could know our kids are struggling, yet still vote against their interests is beyond me. But that's exactly what Kevin McCarthy is doing by trying to crush the Child Tax Credit.

Our community is ready to oust McCarthy, but winning will take A TON of supporters chipping in small amounts to help us get our message out. So I need to ask:

**[I need a boost from you today, friend. Will you join the 5 supporters from 18326 who already chipped in a contribution this week? Any amount helps defeat McCarthy, but $3 from you would go a long way>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212207/340580711/-674430938?refcode=em-4.15.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQyZmE4ZC1hNGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYTyBdLnCaLhv65XXu24b9RWNAi4GMZ1JuxWzSjgkTs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212208/340580712/-674430938?refcode=em-4.15.22-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQyZmE4ZC1hNGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aYTyBdLnCaLhv65XXu24b9RWNAi4GMZ1JuxWzSjgkTs=)

name: Nan Whaley
subject: ​​​​I need to ask you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
I’m not a millionaire – just a regular person who knows that Ohio deserves better. The primary is getting closer, and this is our last chance to show the millionaires that we’re ready for this fight too.

Team,
**FIRST** : We made history together when we launched this campaign – raising more money than any other Democrat candidate for governor in Ohio’s history.
**THEN:** My millionaire opponents flooded the race with millions of their own money.
**NOW:** Our final pre-primary filing deadline is just days away, and I need your help.
I’m not a millionaire – just a regular person who knows that Ohio deserves better. The primary is getting closer, and this is our last chance to show the millionaires that we’re ready for this fight too.
**[We need to raise $10,000 online by our final pre-primary deadline on April 22 to prove we’re ready to hit the ground running in the general election. Pitch in $5 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212473/340582402/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220416_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nHrhwbrUpIAY0ZPn5Txogn6x0xqS-zQ6WLQkbQ8ra-M=) _._**
We’ve let the same corrupt crew run our state for 30 years, even as they’ve been more focused on their special interest allies than on Ohioans. Enough.
As mayor of Dayton, I’ve led our community through some of Ohio’s biggest challenges, from the opioid crisis to the pandemic. I know that’s the kind of experience we need to turn things around and bring back opportunity to our state.
**[We can take back Ohio in 2022, but only if we start the general election off right. Can you chip in $5 before our final pre-primary deadline on April 22 to kick off the next phase of our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212474/340582403/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220416_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nHrhwbrUpIAY0ZPn5Txogn6x0xqS-zQ6WLQkbQ8ra-M=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212475/340582404/-1058194333?refcode=nw_em_220416_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nHrhwbrUpIAY0ZPn5Txogn6x0xqS-zQ6WLQkbQ8ra-M=)****

name: Stanton HQ
subject: Greg's big new endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ztg2OEZbMnAkhcLol1beiKMACD-UVWCGxOIBp2bSzts=/I-sX80nc2-y7jOzt4O9olNFMh4xNiO7r3IDwISHETQQ=)
Friend,

We are extremely excited to share that Greg has been endorsed by the Natural Resources Defense Council Action Fund!
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ztg2OEZbMnAkhcLol1beiKMACD-UVWCGxOIBp2bSzts=/sDXRX2N-vUm8-V05dt4zS97ThXVXv1FJLHwftvtsbsI=?refcode=X_041622_NRDCEndorsement)
---
Since 1970, the Natural Resources Defense Council has fought hard for the rights of all people to have a more sustainable and equitable environment. Their work has been critical in protecting Arizona's air, water, and beautiful wildlife. These are the same causes Greg has been fighting for since he became Mayor of Phoenix.
The NRDC Action Fund understands that as Arizona gets hotter and drier, we need lawmakers who are fighting for solutions that work for everyone -- people like Greg. **That 's why he'll always fight for solutions that protect our environment, secure our water, _and_ support Arizona's economy.**
Having a strong grassroots community is essential to our fight against the growing threat of climate change.
**[_Greg is in one of the toughest races in the country. Will you make sure he can keep working for what matters most by chipping in now?_](https://act.myngp.com/el/ztg2OEZbMnAkhcLol1beiKMACD-UVWCGxOIBp2bSzts=/sDXRX2N-vUm8-V05dt4zS97ThXVXv1FJLHwftvtsbsI=?refcode=X_041622_NRDCEndorsement)**

Thank you!

-- _Stanton HQ_

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ztg2OEZbMnAkhcLol1beiKMACD-UVWCGxOIBp2bSzts=/-qVGhu-nR6zKRAShzkmQcrqfNH3Yg4Uf6dA17EqhMGQ=?refcode=X_041622_NRDCEndorsement)
---

---

Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

subject: Peter, we need to take Wisconsin's lead
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
Lessons from the campaign trail

| |
---
Hi Peter – In case you didn't see [the news](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44197658/340527874/-1866208382?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZTZjZTE2LTg3YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9p5_WIsqP8YfDCrB8hYVZVYRDBBUGOWTSU0uSWDzLwQ=&emci=23d12175-ecbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=8ce6ce16-87bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9364878), the Wisconsin Democratic Party has received immense praise for its fundraising and organizing efforts to hold onto the progress Democrats made in the state in 2020. [__**Chip in here to help URD continue to support Wisconsin Democratic candidates this November.**__](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44197659/340527875/311099802?refcode2=8ce6ce16-87bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220416_hq_wiscapril_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZTZjZTE2LTg3YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9p5_WIsqP8YfDCrB8hYVZVYRDBBUGOWTSU0uSWDzLwQ=) While Republicans in the state have been focused on disinformation around widespread voter fraud in the 2020 election, Democrats have been fighting for progress. Here's what Wisconsin Democratic Party Chair Ben Wikler had to say: “An organizing machine, a party operation and candidates themselves, on the Democratic side, are bringing the party together and energizing people, and Republicans are involved in a civil war.” **But right now, Democrats and Republicans are in a dead-even heat.** That's why the Wisconsin Democratic party has taken our cue – prioritizing voter turnout programs and engaging rural voters ahead of the midterm elections. We need to do everything we can to help Democrats hang onto the states that allowed us to win in 2020. States like Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and Georgia were swing states that went blue in 2020 but are becoming more competitive by the day. We know that the key to winning in crucial states is to engage rural voters and support rural candidates who understand the issues facing these communities. [**Peter, 2022 is shaping up to be a race to the finish. We need to give Democratic candidates and state parties the support they need to organize and turn out voters early. Will you chip in $5 or more so we can give Democrats the resources they need to fight and win?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44197660/340527876/311099802?refcode2=8ce6ce16-87bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&amount=5&refcode=220416_hq_wiscapril_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhjZTZjZTE2LTg3YmQtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9p5_WIsqP8YfDCrB8hYVZVYRDBBUGOWTSU0uSWDzLwQ=) body:
I'm excited to share my first advertisement with you this morning! I'm proud of my record defending our conservative values, and I'm ready to take the | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4d9e27b65996/new-ad-5395327?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=1532cbac0d&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

I'm excited to share my first ad with you this morning!

I have a long record of defending our conservative values on the Board of Supervisors, and I'm ready to take the fight to Congress.

I've opposed illegal immigration in Prince William County. I've stood for the lives of the unborn. I've fought Critical Race Theory. I've opposed costly tax hikes that burden hard-working families. I've even defended the Second Amendment.

Jennifer Wexton and the rest of the radical left have already come after me for it, but I beat them when I won re-election in 2019. Now I'm ready to beat them again.

Take a look here:
---
| [ ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a2e9eb0b97&e=fc83fb200d)
---
|
I'm excited to take the fight to Jennifer Wexton this November, but I'm going to need your help to do it.

Advertising is expensive, and it is critical that we get our message out. [Will you make a small donation of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 to help keep our ads on air and get our message to the voters of Virginia's 10th district?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=7499544380&e=fc83fb200d)

---

I'm counting on you to help me defeat Wexton, put an end to the craziness of the radical left, and save our nation.

For love of country,

Jeanine Lawson

I've stood for the lives of the unborn. I've fought Critical Race Theory. I've opposed costly tax hikes that burden hard-working families. I've even defended the Second Amendment. Jennifer Wexton and the rest of the radical left have already come after me for it, but I beat them when I won re-election in 2019. Now I'm ready to beat them again. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: question for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
There’s only one way we overcome the enormous amount of outside spending targeting Mark... and that’s together.
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34)._
---
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9234?t=7&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34) Friends --

Quick, but serious question:

If you knew contributing just $3 would mean Mark Kelly would get re-elected in November, wouldn’t you donate it for sure?

What if you knew that for $3, we could keep Mitch McConnell from ever becoming Majority Leader again. Wouldn’t it be the best $3 you ever spent?

What if you knew that Mark Kelly is down by TWO POINTS in Arizona in a new poll?

We know that $3 probably doesn’t feel like it is enough money to move the needle, but in the last few minutes alone, close to a dozen people have contributed $3 to accomplish those goals.

Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same. Because there’s only one way we overcome the enormous amount of outside spending targeting Mark... and that’s together.

So, please: We missed our mid-month fundraising goal, so today is a critical time to make any contribution you can to Mark Kelly’s campaign:

[_Can Mark Kelly count on you to split $3 between his re-election campaign and Voter Protection Project so that we can catch up and meet our April fundraising goal?_](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9235?t=9&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9241?t=15&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9242?t=16&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/9243?t=17&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34)
Thank you again. These donations add up. And it’s the only chance we have to win.

Team Kelly
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1838%2E878179%2EvA3D34).**

name: Team Tom
subject: Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 15th for Peter:
body:
Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved.
#

**Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 15th, 2022**
Peter,
This was another incredible week for our campaign. On Tuesday, Tom and Shannon stood side-by-side with Montgomery County leaders, including County Executive Marc Elrich, Council President Gabe Albornoz, and Council Vice President Evan Glass, as they announced their strong support for Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Governor.
Montgomery County is a place of great diversity and opportunity, and we look forward to having County Executive Elrich join our team to fight for jobs and justice for all Marylanders!
All the best,
Team Tom
* * *
**On the Campaign Trail**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213486/340586825/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Shannon started last weekend joining democrats from St Mary’s County for their annual Skipjack Gala. It was great to be back in Southern Maryland to meet the people who work hard each year to elect Democrats.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213487/340586826/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Tom had an amazing Saturday with Mayor Tracy Gant and other Prince Georgians celebrating Spring Fest in Edmonston and New Carrollton!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213488/340586827/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
It is always a good day when you get to spend it with Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass! Shannon was happy to join him for a meet and greet in Potomac on Saturday.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213489/340586828/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Shannon also headed to Prince George’s County Saturday afternoon to get to know more Marylanders and business owners at the Creative Suitland Block Party.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213490/340586829/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213491/340586830/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Both Tom and Shannon were blessed to be able to attend Sunday services in Baltimore City on Sunday. While Tom worshiped at Bethel AME with Rev. Patrick Clayborn and First Lady Rev. Sheri Smith Clayborn, Shannon joined Rev. Dr. Walden Wilson and the Israel Baptist Church congregation for their service.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213492/340586831/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
On Tuesday, Tom and Shannon stood alongside leaders from Montgomery County as County Executive Marc Elrich announced his endorsement of [**#TeamPerezSneed**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213493/340586832/-937941632?q=%23TeamPerezSneed&src=typeahead_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) for Governor!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213494/340586833/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
We are so grateful for the unprecedented amount of support we have received from labor unions in this campaign. Tom had a great time meeting with CWA retirees this week in Beltsville.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213495/340586834/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
[**#TeamPerezSneed**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213496/340586835/-937941632?q=%23TeamPerezSneed&src=typeahead_click&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837) ended their week with a "Jobs, Justice & Opportunity" Eastern Shore Tour, where they were able to meet with more Marylanders, visit with businesses and entrepreneurs, and share their vision of creating a Maryland where zipcode never determines destiny.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213497/340586836/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
The marine trades are a critical economic anchor for so many families in our state. Tom and Shannon kicked off their tour with marine trade business leaders from across Queen Anne's County.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213498/340586837/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
No trip to Cambridge is complete without taking a moment to pay our respects at the truly powerful Harriet Tubman mural.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213499/340586838/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Offshore wind is the green energy economy of the future — and the present. It was amazing to be able to tour the ARCON training center in Salisbury and see their amazing facility firsthand.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213500/340586839/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
From training welders, to providing safety training and more, sites like this are primed to create a pipeline of high quality job opportunities for years to come.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213501/340586840/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Easton is a lively town filled with great opportunity. We had the pleasure of taking a tour of the various small businesses in the area who work day in and out to keep Easton a thriving city.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213502/340586841/1083112743?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE1MDk3MC1hY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ydYWvUrWG1-g1kuiT3uAP-XzC2jxZsWSQfjngmpD4X4=&emci=4e33b4c9-d4bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=68150970-acbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=14684837)
Thank you to the great folks from the Eastern Shore for an amazing and informative day! We wrapped our tour with a packed room in Talbot County sharing the #TeamPerezSneed vision. Shannon even had the opportunity to reconnect with her former professor from the University of Maryland-Eastern Shore and fellow AKA soror.
Together, we will create a Maryland that works for everyone.
* * *

clean_body: Thank you for your generous support of Tom's campaign! Keep reading for a recap of his time on the campaign trail, an update on upcoming events, and ways to get involved. Team Tom Weekly Update | Friday, April 15th, 2022 Peter, This was another incredible week for our campaign. On Tuesday, Tom and Shannon stood side-by-side with Montgomery County leaders, including County Executive Marc Elrich, Council President Gabe Albornoz, and Council Vice President Evan Glass, as they announced their strong support for Tom Perez and Shannon Sneed for Governor. Montgomery County is a place of great diversity and opportunity, and we look forward to having County Executive Elrich join our team to fight for jobs and justice for all Marylanders! All the best, Team Tom On the Campaign Trail Shannon started last weekend joining democrats from St Mary’s County for their annual Skipjack Gala. It was great to be back in Southern Maryland to meet the people who work hard each year to elect Democrats. Tom had an amazing Saturday with Mayor Tracy Gant and other Prince Georgians celebrating Spring Fest in Edmonston and New Carrollton! It is always a good day when you get to spend it with Montgomery County Council Vice President Evan Glass! Shannon was happy to join him for a meet and greet in Potomac on Saturday. Shannon also headed to Prince George’s County Saturday afternoon to get to know more Marylanders and business owners at the Creative Suitland Block Party. Both Tom and Shannon were blessed to be able to attend Sunday services in Baltimore City on Sunday. While Tom worshiped at Bethel AME with Rev. Patrick Clayborn and First Lady Rev. Sheri Smith Clayborn, Shannon joined Rev. Dr. Walden Wilson and the Israel Baptist Church congregation for their service. On Tuesday, Tom and Shannon stood alongside leaders from Montgomery County as County Executive Marc Elrich announced his endorsement of for Governor! We are so grateful for the unprecedented amount of support we have received from labor unions in this campaign. Tom had a great time meeting with CWA retirees this week in Beltsville. ended their week with a "Jobs, Justice & Opportunity" Eastern Shore Tour, where they were able to meet with more Marylanders, visit with businesses and entrepreneurs, and share their vision of creating a Maryland where zipcode never determines destiny. The marine trades are a critical economic anchor for so many families in our state. Tom and Shannon kicked off their tour with marine trade business leaders from across Queen Anne's County. No trip to Cambridge is complete without taking a moment to pay our respects at the truly powerful Harriet Tubman mural. Offshore wind is the green energy economy of the future — and the present. It was amazing to be able to tour the ARCON training center in Salisbury and see their amazing facility firsthand. From training welders, to providing safety training and more, sites like this are primed to create a pipeline of high quality job opportunities for years to come. Easton is a lively town filled with great opportunity. We had the pleasure of taking a tour of the various small businesses in the area who work day in and out to keep Easton a thriving city. Thank you to the great folks from the Eastern Shore for an amazing and informative day! We wrapped our tour with a packed room in Talbot County sharing the #TeamPerezSneed vision. Shannon even had the opportunity to reconnect with her former professor from the University of Maryland-Eastern Shore and fellow AKA soror. Together, we will create a Maryland that works for everyone. In the News "Elrich said in a statement that Perez had both experience to do the job and “a heart and mind that understands justice and equity.” “I have the values, the experience and the proven track record to get stuff done," he said. "I’m a proud member of the GSD wing of the democratic party. I want to get stuff done and that’s why I’m running for governor.” Schedule of Events******** Friday, April 22 | 6:00 PM Los Angeles, CA Hosted by Wendy Greuel & Dean Schramm, Elizabeth Hirsh Naftali, Jihee Huh, Simon Pang, Drew Pomerance, and Alex Rooker Sunday, April 24 | 3:00 PM MT Denver, CO Hosted by Rep. name: James Carville
subject: This poll made me damn terrified
body:
Derek,
At 77 years young, I’ve read about a million polls in my life, and very few have made me as terrified as the one I just reviewed:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM]
You read that right! Catherine Cortez Masto is L-O-S-I-N-G to her Trump-endorsed extremist opponent . But trust me Derek, this poll didn’t come out of thin air.
Mitch McConnell’s allies are MASSIVELY outspending Catherine’s campaign. They have already spent more than $4 million on vicious, nasty, lying attack ads to defeat her and the attacks seem to be working.
Ahead of her upcoming fundraising deadline, I’m asking you to split a contribution of $25 or more between Catherine and CommonGood. We need Democrats stepping up RIGHT NOW to help Catherine punch back against McConnell’s attacks. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM]
If we lose Nevada, you can kiss our Senate majority goodbye and hand it to Mitch McConnell on a silver platter.
So I cannot believe that Democrats would just sit by and let the first and only Latina in the Senate lose to some Trumpist conspiracy theorist wacko!
If Catherine is going to fight back and close this awful polling gap, she needs to raise $8,450 before midnight tonight. But with only a few hours to go she’s on track to fall short! I promised Catherine I would help her hit her goal, and Derek, I'm personally counting on you splitting a contribution between her campaign and CommonGood right now: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM]
I promise you, Catherine can win this race — but falling short of goals like this means taking ads off the air, fewer doors knocked, and fewer voters registered — and that is NOT an option.
Split $25 between Catherine’s campaign and CommonGood right now>> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_ccm?refcode=20220416_CGVA_CCM]
Thank you for stepping up at this crucial moment.
James Carville
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

Common Good Virginia
PO Box 26112
Arlington, VA 22215
If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/3fafff92-98bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/3cac3dd9-aabd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FjM2RkOS1hYWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s511T035hvb-vmZ5HSdEGCPcPKlPh6q37xMbuShVl6s=&id=108609855 .

body:
Greene, Cawthorne, Boebert, Gatez, Gosar, & Palin
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44201476/340545577/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDhiMjc3Zi04ZGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-yWNL9njgAZZszc3p7fNj7tVeIeISOysq3id2DIUy-U=&emci=7536ae61-fbbb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c48b277f-8dbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)
Peter,

Earlier this month, Sarah Palin announced she's running for Congress to join the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene, Madison Cawthorne, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and Matt Gaetz in the increasingly radical House GOP.

If Seth's Republican opponent, Allan Fung, is elected, his first vote in Congress would be to give control of the House to Kevin McCarthy and these extreme Republicans who care more about doing Trump's bidding than helping working people.

Peter, we can't afford to let that happen, which is why it's crucial we send Seth to Congress and keep RI-02 blue.

Right now, Ukrainians are bravely defending their country with Iowa-made weapons. Russian armored columns are getting stopped in their tracks with American Javelin missiles – crucial parts of which are made right here in Iowa.
**But if it were up to Donald Trump, Ukraine would be on its own against his pal Putin – still waiting for American military aid until President Zelensky agreed to open a sham investigation into Joe Biden.**
And my opponent Chuck Grassley was one of 52 Republican senators who chose blind loyalty to Trump over helping Ukraine defend itself against Russia.
When I defeat Chuck Grassely this November, I will be the most senior military person ever-elected to the Senate. I understand the real threat Russia poses and the importance of NATO, and I’ll ensure Iowa continues to help Ukraine against Putin’s war-crime invasion.
If our campaign is successful in turning Iowa blue, Democrats are guaranteed to hold onto our majority in the Senate. But the polls are showing a very close race, and McConnell’s Super PACs are about to spend millions against me.
**We need to raise $10,000 before midnight tonight, and right now we’re still falling short. The only way we’ll defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**

body:
Sharing updates on the historic Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger case
Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213881/340588816/1793776944?ms=em_20220416_f_p_trial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWUxMDIwYy1hZmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjL5GQOxfML2pm5d_TMY44D7_z_0atO8vDMNXNvVJ6k=&emci=c699085c-f5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7ee1020c-afbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | In case you missed it, Fair Fight Action has taken Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board to Court. The _Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger_ trial began this week. Our case challenges the constitutionality of suppressive voting practices we witnessed during the 2018 and subsequent elections (**[you can read about it in the New York Times here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213882/340588817/2022107009?ms=em_20220416_f_p_trial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWUxMDIwYy1hZmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjL5GQOxfML2pm5d_TMY44D7_z_0atO8vDMNXNvVJ6k=&emci=c699085c-f5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7ee1020c-afbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)**). Here’s what’s happened so far:
* Multiple Georgia voters and would-be voters have testified about how they faced obstacles while trying to register and vote in past elections — and their stories are now in the legal record for this case. These voters and would-be voters show the impact the practices we challenge have on real Georgians who are eligible, but not always able, to cast their vote.
* Expert witnesses and community leaders have also testified, documenting the barriers to voting that stand in the way of Georgians’ exercising their fundamental right to vote. These witnesses have explained the role of the Secretary of State and State Election Board in creating and maintaining barriers to voting, as well as options for improving access to the ballot for all voters.
* Through the questioning of a former Secretary of State official, we elicited testimony about the absence of instruction by the Secretary of State’s Office to the counties regarding processes and standards for maintaining the voter rolls, as well as evidence that Georgia removed more felons from the voter rolls than any other state.

The _Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger_ trail is a historic moment. This is an opportunity for Georgia voters to finally have their day in court and fight back against policies and practices that make it harder to vote in Georgia. [_**You’re making this vital work possible. Will you take a moment and click here to add your name in support of Georgia voters?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213883/340588818/-256470540?refcode=em_20220416_f_p_trial&ms=em_20220416_f_p_trial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWUxMDIwYy1hZmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjL5GQOxfML2pm5d_TMY44D7_z_0atO8vDMNXNvVJ6k=&emci=c699085c-f5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7ee1020c-afbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) Our goal in _Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger_ is to continue to elevate the voices of Georgia voters and fight for an elections system in which every eligible voter has the chance to make their voice heard. We have already seen progress for Georgians as a result of filing our suit, including the significant achievement when 22,000 Georgians were restored to the voting rolls instead of being purged from the active voter list. And we know that a win here in Georgia will be a win for _everyone_. We couldn’t do any of this work without your support. Thank you, thank you, thank you for making this possible. [_**Your support during this historic moment means so much. Please click here to add your name and affirm that you support Fair Fight Action.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44213884/340588819/-256470540?refcode=em_20220416_f_p_trial&ms=em_20220416_f_p_trial&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWUxMDIwYy1hZmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fjL5GQOxfML2pm5d_TMY44D7_z_0atO8vDMNXNvVJ6k=&emci=c699085c-f5bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7ee1020c-afbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277) Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team |

clean_body: Sharing updates on the historic Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger case Fair Fight | | | In case you missed it, Fair Fight Action has taken Georgia’s Secretary of State and State Election Board to Court. The Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger trial began this week. Our case challenges the constitutionality of suppressive voting practices we witnessed during the 2018 and subsequent elections (). Here’s what’s happened so far: Multiple Georgia voters and would-be voters have testified about how they faced obstacles while trying to register and vote in past elections — and their stories are now in the legal record for this case. These voters and would-be voters show the impact the practices we challenge have on real Georgians who are eligible, but not always able, to cast their vote. Expert witnesses and community leaders have also testified, documenting the barriers to voting that stand in the way of Georgians’ exercising their fundamental right to vote. These witnesses have explained the role of the Secretary of State and State Election Board in creating and maintaining barriers to voting, as well as options for improving access to the ballot for all voters. * Through the questioning of a former Secretary of State official, we elicited testimony about the absence of instruction by the Secretary of State’s Office to the counties regarding processes and standards for maintaining the voter rolls, as well as evidence that Georgia removed more felons from the voter rolls than any other state. The Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger trail is a historic moment. This is an opportunity for Georgia voters to finally have their day in court and fight back against policies and practices that make it harder to vote in Georgia. Our goal in Fair Fight Action v. Raffensperger is to continue to elevate the voices of Georgia voters and fight for an elections system in which every eligible voter has the chance to make their voice heard. We have already seen progress for Georgians as a result of filing our suit, including the significant achievement when 22,000 Georgians were restored to the voting rolls instead of being purged from the active voter list. And we know that a win here in Georgia will be a win for everyone. We couldn’t do any of this work without your support. Thank you, thank you, thank you for making this possible. Thank you, The Fair Fight Action Team | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-430 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Contributions to Fair Fight Action are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by Fair Fight Action

Hi Peter Willis,
It’s Lou & Mary Grace - we want to personally reach out to you and say thanks!

Because of your continued support and dedication to our campaign, we exceeded our mid-month fundraising goal and were able to get back on track with April projections! We’ve had an incredible start to the first month of Q2 and the results have been really encouraging. Folks across PA are rallying behind our campaign because they know PA is in dire need of proven Conservartive leadership and we are honored to have so much strong support across the Commonwealth.

Thousands of supporters, like you, Peter Willis, took the initiative and pushed us over the finish line and we cannot express enough how thankful we are for your continued support. This is truly a grassroots effort.

We would be honored to represent you in Harrisburg and together, we will accomplish so much!
Thank you again for your continued support. It is sincerely appreciated.
---

clean_body: | | | | Your support means the world | Hi Peter Willis, It’s Lou & Mary Grace - we want to personally reach out to you and say thanks! Because of your continued support and dedication to our campaign, we exceeded our mid-month fundraising goal and were able to get back on track with April projections! We’ve had an incredible start to the first month of Q2 and the results have been really encouraging. Folks across PA are rallying behind our campaign because they know PA is in dire need of proven Conservartive leadership and we are honored to have so much strong support across the Commonwealth. Thousands of supporters, like you, Peter Willis, took the initiative and pushed us over the finish line and we cannot express enough how thankful we are for your continued support. This is truly a grassroots effort. We would be honored to represent you in Harrisburg and together, we will accomplish so much! Thank you again for your continued support. It is sincerely appreciated. | | Lou & Mary Grace Barletta | | | | To contribute by mail, please make payable to “Lou Barletta for Governor” and mail to: Lou Barletta for Governor PO Box 128 Hazleton, PA 18201 =

This is inhumane, violating, and archaic. **A future where women are punished for making medical decisions about THEIR OWN BODIES is no longer just a possibility. It 's _happening_.**
We need to protect the right to choose in Congress _as soon as possible_. Republicans will use this to attack representatives in swing districts, so we need to make sure we support all our frontline candidates.
**[Our 16 frontline Congresswomen are unapologetically pro-choice. Support them and protect our House majority by chipping in now >>](https://act.myngp.com/el/LRwxFk3_u_OVVF5dQD_61lJnNurdQfXJ4ntyMd9LM40=/iDYGD_Ev_4qhVfuNPkWSFFChDlv8chocExYtnxsmU_M=?refcode=X_041622_TexasArrest)**

name: Hung Cao
subject: Here’s what we need to do:
body:
If we’re going to win this race, we’re going to have to do something BIG. [](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=3d0a8e212560419f9e7ec9013e04fefa&_e=qPi03uk9LYSL27OBP2vvN_56Vq5FhUQpH7gFTSddUAaXSjTWdUgJWqbh7JdGWuCHV7swmyYa-oCsdeMe9-GUMJkvr9J9B5JZq22o2u6VFenNDfqngDeo_KLrrUPkBXTZb5XutU2uKyAkuKsdU2a2cG95suPh9kNIQjmjI_KYIx36ig5bAy_l9Iwa_cM6HLe15I0Dmq7gSvbiK6hUAhQ4sbKUpgW_3PhrTqzyR2k65cN7bhFDdpcncZuEEVhzTIFLjGvxUMtpz_LNPaerT5Fgd4IFsM237R92GzLyHcEl_xpTx8PI_BPA1a9ZKSjyBN5DpaNsMX8TsRjoAu3n_fRiWYeB9OFxNV1SNBCUCU5i0Yn72Hc_I1HD94GCRTBL3gVkDJV96RYJOudYPXIzfsqJcoPuXoS_MoEVurbk6TP5uoc%3D) Peter, **If we’re going to win this race, we’re going to have to do something BIG. **

My team has an idea, but if we’re going to pull this off, we need your help.

**We want to get campaign bumper stickers on AS MANY CARS AS WE CAN in our district - but we need to raise $3,000 to start printing them.**

body:
This is critical to our fight against the far-right in Ohio.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220416-952-footer-ak&t=2&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)
**We’re officially live with our first TV ad of the primary campaign.** We couldn’t be more excited, but we’ll be honest – running TV ads is a lot more expensive than advertising on social media or through text messages.
It’s going to take a steady stream of grassroots donations to keep our TV ad on the air. [**_That’s why as we quickly approach the end of the month and the primary election, we’re humbly asking you to donate to our TV ad fund. Can you chip in $5 — or anything you can — to keep our advertisement on the airwaves for as long as possible?_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=3&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)
**[Watch + Donate →](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=4&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)**
This is what we’re up against:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=5&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=6&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)
Yep, J.D. Vance and Josh Mandel are running TV ads, and they’re just as ridiculous and offensive as you’d expect. J.D. Vance talks about how he wants to “build the wall,” and Josh Mandel completely disrespects the legacy of MLK.
This is exactly the type of far-right vitriol that we’re fighting back against with our own TV ads. And now that J.D. Vance has officially been endorsed by Donald Trump, keeping our ad on air is even more critical.
[**_Please, donate to our TV ad fund to help us get in front of as many voters as possible. If you haven’t yet, you can also click here to watch the full Morgan Harper ad._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=7&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)
**[Watch + Donate →](https://act.morganharper.org/go/31742?t=8&akid=952%2E90090%2EOZrlVZ)**

Team Morgan Harper

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: “A despicable day in the Senate” - Vice President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
On April 17, 2013, I was sitting in Vice President Joe Biden's ceremonial office in the Capitol.
#

Friends -
On April 17, 2013—nine years ago tomorrow—I was sitting in then Vice President Joe Biden's ceremonial office in the Capitol as I watched the United States Senate block a bipartisan bill to close the loopholes that let people buy guns without a background check.
Shortly after the vote ended, the Vice President told me it was "a despicable day in the Senate," and invited me to join him and President Obama at the White House. In the motorcade up Pennsylvania Avenue, the Vice President told me our country always rejects extreme views in the end, and that commonsense gun safety legislation would pass eventually—that it was not a question of if, but when.
Nine years later, he’s president and I’m still fighting for that big piece of legislation that will make communities safer from gun violence.
If we can get him the bill, he’ll sign.
So please:
[**Can you please make a contribution—$3 or whatever you can afford—to help Giffords PAC elect a Congress that will pass legislation making our communities safer from gun violence? I cannot do this alone.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-1-30&t=1&refcode2=1819_3935704_a_TDiT&akid=1819%2E3935704%2Ea_TDiT)

Hi Peter,
I am excited to announce that, thanks to your support, we are currently leading the Alaska Senate Race!
But the fight has only just begun.
DC Dark Money groups are pouring in millions of dollars to support Liberal Lisa Murkowski. They know she will always vote with Joe Biden and the Democrats. Just look she voted to confirm their handpicked judge, Kentanji Brown!

clean_body: | | | | Only hours remain | Hi Peter, I am excited to announce that, thanks to your support, we are currently leading the Alaska Senate Race! But the fight has only just begun. DC Dark Money groups are pouring in millions of dollars to support Liberal Lisa Murkowski. They know she will always vote with Joe Biden and the Democrats. Just look she voted to confirm their handpicked judge, Kentanji Brown! While they have outside money, WE have YOU! Our campaign runs on grassroots supporters, not DC insiders. After midnight tonight, we won’t have another opportunity to get back on track until the final days of the month. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | =

name: Vernon Jones
subject: We'd be lost without him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vernon for Congress

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Why I voted no on parts of the state budget
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
#
Friend, it’s Alessandra.
Last week, I voted against two of the seven bills in Governor Kathy Hochul’s first budget. I’m reaching out because I want you to hear directly from me why I voted this way.
**The truth is that the 2022-2023 budget offers kickbacks to corporations and billionaires while leaving working families in our state behind.**
The budget simply does not allocate enough funding to fight the climate crisis, support CUNY and SUNY, pay home care workers a living wage, fund healthcare, and support affordable housing development in our state.
It denies undocumented New Yorkers the ability to access childcare and rolls back key criminal justice reform legislation, and provides a kickback of $600 million to the Buffalo Bills for their new stadium, a provision that I voted against.
Additionally, Gov. Hochul made a promise to clean up corruption in our state after the lack of transparency that marked the Cuomo administration. As Chair of the Senate Ethics committee, this was a promise I cared deeply about. Her budget this year allocated funding for a new ethics body to replace the Joint Committee on Public Ethics (JCOPE), the board in charge of setting standards for ethics in state government. But the newly proposed body doesn’t have the tools to solve the persistent integrity problems that plagued JCOPE.
**There are aspects of this budget that are worthy of praise, which I was proud to vote in favor for. More New Yorkers than ever will now have access to childcare, and childcare providers will get the support they deserve from the state.**
And the budget provides funding to pay for absentee ballot postage and allows poll sites to be opened on college campuses so that every eligible New Yorker can vote easily and quickly.
I’m looking forward to seeing how these policies positively impact New Yorkers’ lives, but I also recognize that Governor Hochul’s budget does not do nearly enough to uplift working New Yorkers.
I will continue to do all I can to fight for policies that improve the lives of New Yorkers of all ages, races, genders, and socioeconomic backgrounds. That’s my promise to you.
Thank you for reading,
Alessandra
* * *
[**Friend, if you are able, please make a $5 contribution to Alessandra Biaggi’s campaign for Congress in NY-3. She won’t be able to organize and win without the help of supporters like you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220416-1-15&refcode2=705_59515_-Easei&akid=705%2E59515%2E-Easei)
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-april/?refcode=em220416-1-15&refcode2=705_59515_-Easei&akid=705%2E59515%2E-Easei)**

Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.alessandrabiaggi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=705%2E59515%2E-Easei).

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: My father the pastor
body:
When I was growing up, I spent every Sunday in the pews of my father’s church.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2378f9nig441edls7n11mirc26ahgsmchv0mnh8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfcpdlmprbctlje2oecp33e1jm6dblehpn8or1e5rbcdr16hgr8djjcthjfd9keurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coorecr0s1pbaphh62pm8dtgmlin49fg)
Fellow conservative, When I was growing up, I spent every Sunday in the pews of my father’s church. Those Sundays taught me the importance of faith, community, and service - but now, the radical Left is trying to erase Christianity from our country. Churches across America are losing their young people to the lures of cultural Marxism, and it’s bringing our country further and further away from the values that make our country strong. **It’s time to make America worship again, and I need your help to re-inspire our young people back into their churches.** **[Join me today to bring Judeo-Christian values back to Congress and make America worship again. >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zskfk9vtqm30v6n2bjad42j7b25544ncog80cj28_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs)** [**PITCH IN $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfcr1u4fvubqjtvu8ii51ojabcev1h5n9dm2tbh0_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) [**PITCH IN $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj4fjdtaieqlt87g0j1jhtts39fqg104j565iivg_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) [**PITCH IN $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdu7ns6irorp420f0e19u61i8nrk5qto4cc40ee8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) [**PITCH IN $250**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4025nlc07a6kp9mie5dtglieuek5s8ig8g44gbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) [**PITCH IN OTHER AMOUNT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvakf85rt85ebq9hk34doanvp3nkgiglrdo751a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) The lessons I learned in church inspired me to go on to serve our country in the US Army as an intelligence officer. Churches across America are inspiring greatness - but not enough people are hearing their message. It’s time to get our young people out of the grips of socialist Hollywood and back into the pews, and I’m leading by example - but I can’t finish this mission without you. **_[So please, join me today to make America worship again and inspire a new era of faith. >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo3h2fqluvnl79i003hc1lpo39g9kd0c9afafm70_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs)_** Thank you, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zapfn3fpigbkkukabt5ltikqk9kgvs0j4185iufo_rp22sh2s8i66pb0chj6aor2clh2bs) Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Do you have a moment?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
Erica is running in a must-win swing district to defend our Democratic House majority.
#
Hi, it's Elizabeth Warren.
**I am proud to endorse Erica Smith in her campaign for Congress in North Carolina’s 1st District.**
As a single mom, minister, educator, and former state legislator, Erica has been a champion for her community for years, and she’s the progressive fighter we need in Congress.
[**Her primary election is nearly four weeks away. Can you help elect Erica by making a donation today? Your contribution will make a real difference to get out the vote in these powerfully important final weeks.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49412?refcode=em20220416-1096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1096%2E3698%2E8fVwAY)
**[Donate $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49412?refcode=em20220416-1096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1096%2E3698%2E8fVwAY)**
Here’s one reason I’m very happy to support Erica: she knows that policy is personal. She knows what it means to work all day to put food on the family table, to fight to survive while being crushed by medical bills and student debt, and to drop out of school because of poor rural broadband access.
And she’s ready to fight back against corporations and special interests that have rigged the rules to benefit the wealthy and well-connected at the expense of working people.
**Erica is running in a must-win swing district to defend our Democratic House majority.** She has a plan to protect this seat and deliver a Rural New Deal that will lift up family farms, raise the minimum wage, unionize the South, and provide universal broadband and healthcare for ALL.
[**I’m fired up to work with her in Congress — but we’ve got to make sure she wins this critical primary election. If you can, please make a donation to support Erica’s campaign today.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/49412?refcode=em20220416-1096&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1096%2E3698%2E8fVwAY)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth Warren

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220416-1096-footer&t=22&refcode2=1096_3698_8fVwAY&akid=1096%2E3698%2E8fVwAY)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=1096%2E3698%2E8fVwAY)

name: Chief Demings
subject: My law enforcement career? The GOP is attacking it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I entered the police academy because I loved my community
| | |
---
Friend: This is an especially important message about my 27 years of dedicated service as a police officer. As Marco Rubio launches desperate attacks on my law enforcement career, I hope you'll read this to the end.
I entered the police academy because I loved my community and wanted to protect it from harm. After graduating at the top of my class, I woke up and put on my uniform every day, ready to risk my life because _ _ I took an oath to protect and serve the people of Florida.
**While I was working the midnight shift, Marco Rubio was plotting his trajectory as a career politician. **I’ll put my record up against his any day – but the problem is, Rubio has the powerful influence of the GOP dark-money machine on his side.
As national Republicans spend millions of dollars on attack ads that question my loyalty to the men and women in law enforcement, I need your help today to set the record straight: [**Will you donate $5 or more to help me reach more voters and flip Florida blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44215533/340596429/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNzIxYS1iOGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=liB1NFQ3nw4Hr29AvKuFpE5WdRq3NBCwPp8xHrUOxrA=)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44215534/340596430/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNzIxYS1iOGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=liB1NFQ3nw4Hr29AvKuFpE5WdRq3NBCwPp8xHrUOxrA=)
Back in 1983, **I was one of only three women in my police academy class**. But after years of hard work and dedication, I rose to the top of the department and became the first woman to serve as Orlando's chief of police.
My story doesn't stop there. When I was appointed chief of police, Orlando was in crisis. The murder rate was at an all-time high, but I brought the department together and built relationships within the community. Standing with the brave men and women of the Orlando Police Department, we reduced violent crime by 40%.
To protect the city of Orlando, it took long, sleepless nights. And if I'm elected to the Senate, I'm ready to spend long nights protecting our right to vote, reproductive rights, access to health care and so much more.
I'll never stop fighting to protect and serve. If you're with me, please donate $5 or whatever you can right now to flip Florida blue.

Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44215535/340596431/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2932-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NzhiNzIxYS1iOGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=liB1NFQ3nw4Hr29AvKuFpE5WdRq3NBCwPp8xHrUOxrA=)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for joining this grassroots movement.

Val Demings

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. Hello,

Yesterday, I was honored to receive a birthday card with the names of so many members of our team. And today, I want to thank you for reaching out.

With everything going on in the world, and in your own lives, it meant a lot to me that so many of you were willing to take the time to send along birthday wishes.

If it's not too much though, I'd like to ask you an extra favor.

[**Could you chip in an extra donation to help continue our work together?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44206906/340567908/608445111?refcode=em22_220414_mm2_fndd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220414_mm2_fndd_gq_act___tc_ettx&utm_medium=email&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjhiZWY0MS05OGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mtyEpeDBElu4_FIrh4JECZQmKfm1rKcaQa9jgAaVCqg=)

I know that this isn't an easy time, especially as oil companies continue to gouge families at the pump, but if just 52 more of you – one donor for every seat we hope to hold after the election – give by Saturday's mid-month deadline, it will make a bigger difference than you know. As the November election gets closer every day, I'm counting on your support to help us identify and support the candidates who can win and keep our recovery moving forward. = Thank you, Bob If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC. Bob Casey for Senate PO Box 58746 Philadelphia, PA 19102 United States

clean_body: | | | | Did you miss Harriet’s email? | Peter \- Monday at midnight our April Mid-Month deadline will be over and we are still short of our $22,000 goal. Harriet will always fight for YOU and the great state of Wyoming, We NEED to send a message! Chip in today. >> Thank you, Team Hageman \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Harriet H. Subject: What happened? To: Hi Peter, Did you see this headline? Cheney capitalizes off national profile to raise $2.9 million in first quarter of 2022 -NBC News | Rebecca Shabad With Cheney being such an outspoken critic of President Trump, it is no wonder why the Democrats, DC Elite and Dark Money super PACs are pouring millions into her campaign to support her. And while they think they can win just by buying Wyoming, I know it’s grassroots supporters, like YOU, Peter, that will help us win! Thanks to your support, President Trump’s endorsement, Republican Rand Paul’s endorsement, Republican Kevin McCarthy’s endorsement and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik’s endorsement, I know it is our time! But to combat Cheney, my team has raised the stakes and upped our April Mid-Month goal by $22,000. It’s time for us to FIGHT BACK against Cheney and her big-government bureaucrats who want to manage our lands, control our lives, and dictate what we are allowed to think and say. You have always been one of our Top Supporters and I know you won't let us down. Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Endorsed by President Trump | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

body:
#

Friends — we’ll keep this short.
We are writing to humbly ask if you would make your first donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
We are trying to get to 1 million individual donors before the end of the month, and if you chip in, we’re going to reach this goal. You might even be the one that gets us over the top!
So, whether you’re sending $5 or another amount, it all adds up when we’re all doing our part.
And that’s how we re-elect Mark Kelly. Together.
[**So please, can you make your first contribution to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign today? name: Charlie Crist
subject: Floridians vs. billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
a tale of two campaigns |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44215730/340597356/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220416_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDFjNGE0Yi1iY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is5ZVCa_ABVWbD17_qJL-Isp_sEi2nvFONT8QKknc8o=)

Friends,

I'd like to tell you a tale of two campaigns: mine and Gov. DeSantis's.
* My campaign is powered by everyday _Floridians_ , and I spend every day talking to folks, listening to their concerns, and traveling across the state to meet with them in their communities.

* Gov. DeSantis's campaign is funded by far-right _billionaires_. Ron's not very friendly, but when he does talk to people, it's only the rich donors he needs to run for President in 2024 (and hint, most aren't Floridians either).

**What's the moral of this story? Ron DeSantis has never — and will never — put Florida first. He'll happily throw Floridians under the bus to advance his hyper-partisan agenda to fuel his political ambitions.[So if you want a governor who actually governs, will you make a contribution to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44215731/340597357/1278717326?&amount=25&refcode=20220416_f_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDFjNGE0Yi1iY2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=is5ZVCa_ABVWbD17_qJL-Isp_sEi2nvFONT8QKknc8o=)**

clean_body: a tale of two campaigns | | | | = Friends, I'd like to tell you a tale of two campaigns: mine and Gov. DeSantis's. My campaign is powered by everyday Floridians , and I spend every day talking to folks, listening to their concerns, and traveling across the state to meet with them in their communities. Gov. DeSantis's campaign is funded by far-right billionaires. Ron's not very friendly, but when he does talk to people, it's only the rich donors he needs to run for President in 2024 (and hint, most aren't Floridians either). What's the moral of this story? Ron DeSantis has never — and will never — put Florida first. He'll happily throw Floridians under the bus to advance his hyper-partisan agenda to fuel his political ambitions.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks again for all your support, Charlie = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3290%2E3611125%2Ejg3qYq ][IMG]

Folks—this is a critical moment in our battleground race:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10814?t=1007&akid=3290%2E3611125%2Ejg3qYq ][IMG]

Our Democratic majority in the Senate is hanging by a thread. It’s more
important than ever that we secure this battleground seat and end Mitch
McConnell’s chances of snatching back the gavel.

Tim is neck-and-neck in the polls with his millionaire GOP opponents. This
is our best shot to flip a seat blue, but national Republicans are ramping
up their attacks against us—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10812?t=1010&amount=25&akid=3290%2E3611125%2Ejg3qYq ]rush a grassroots contribution to make sure
Tim has the resources to fight back!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10812?t=1011&amount=25&akid=3290%2E3611125%2Ejg3qYq ]Donate

We’re losing our advantage in battleground states across the country—and
Ohio is one of the GOP’s top targets.

National Republicans have been laser-focused on attacking Tim since day
one of this campaign, but the messy GOP primary has kept his opponents
busy fighting amongst themselves.

Tim’s Republican opponent will be determined in less than 3 weeks. Trump
and the GOP will unite behind their chosen candidate—and point their
entire arsenal of firepower directly at Tim.

Tim has raised more from individual supporters than all of his Republican
opponents combined. He can WIN, but he’s about to face a wave of attacks
and outside spending from corporate billionaires and far-right super PACs.
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10812?t=1012&amount=25&akid=3290%2E3611125%2Ejg3qYq ]Can we count on you to have Tim’s back with a contribution to our
people-powered campaign?

I look forward to hearing what you have to say, Peter. I hope you’ll stand with me by sharing your support for a women’s right to choose.
Abortion ban laws like these disproportionately affect low-income women and women of color, who already face greater challenges accessing reproductive health services, and set an extremely dangerous precedent that Republican-led states across the country are already copying.
It’s clear Republican leaders won’t stop here with these abortion bans, and the best defense against cruel bans like these is electing Democratic governors. I will always work to ensure that women’s reproductive rights are protected in Maryland. If you’re with me, I would love to hear from you.
