name: Adam Schiff
subject: DeJoy insists on a gas-powered USPS mail truck fleet — why?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| This is outrageous, short-sighted, and just plain stupid.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)
Derek,
While President Biden signed a landmark Post Office reform bill into law last week — finally putting the Postal Service on solid footing again — Trump’s handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy was still at work trying to sabotage and undermine the USPS with his backward and destructive policies.
**As the Post Office negotiates a contract to purchase a fleet of 160,000 new mail trucks, DeJoy is pushing for a 90% gasoline-powered fleet. Talk about behind the times.**
You read that right. DeJoy wants to pay over $11 billion in taxpayer dollars for a fleet that doesn’t even get 9 miles per gallon — which would pump 20 million metric tons of CO2 into the atmosphere. That’s the equivalent of adding 4.3 million passenger cars to America’s roads.
He won’t even consider the more cost-effective, sustainable alternative of an all-electric fleet. What else would you expect from a Trump loyalist?
[**Derek, this is outrageous, short-sighted, and just plain stupid. If you agree the USPS needs to reverse course immediately and move to an all-electric mail truck fleet, add your name to my urgent petition today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220416-usps-trucks?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220416_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220416-usps-trucks?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220416_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)
---
I don’t need to tell you what a disaster it would be to lock in this contract. Why on earth would we willingly pump more toxic pollutants into the atmosphere knowing there are better alternatives?
Last week’s report from the United Nations’ Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change shows just how dire things are, and how little time we have left to act to stave off the worst effects of the climate crisis.
You have to be deep in fossil fuel lobbyists’ pockets or deep in denial to think a new gas-powered fleet is a good idea in 2022.
[**Derek, add your name to my petition demanding the USPS reverse course on their gas-powered mail truck fleet and invest our taxpayer dollars into electric vehicles.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220416-usps-trucks?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220416_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.adamschiff.com/sign/engagement-20220416-usps-trucks?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220416_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)
---
The American people did not elect President Biden and Democratic majorities in Congress for one Trump crony at the head of the USPS to continue with this destructive policy. Thanks for adding your name — we can’t let DeJoy get away with this.
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=181%2E5257348%2EfjMtUa)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---

name: Matt Jacobs
subject: Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
[](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=f931b953e3624a188a239edd564e100e&_e=nDWnLYNARpewzQelld3om6Dk9bfLSiosIA5Vp0L5Q9ZOUXpyncZ5E7QrgKRb25fslrFcrC9kDPZWxM6NSqdNjcMj0judIQvQvSqmT3jCzVZzr62qhsPGlkzkylBvzrjg12ub3hpvy8YTgWiITLcljFC5RMlpwO8kS9OOYtRxItSe0PagOTekQgpCQdL-pJ5UA3Fo-sJulr8vlaqRgioTUSYayLSi2FdoA0_8M1BuDc6aazV3pC0haflY1-_Uep7GFdWAzsc7NbEDdsRJZJ5kgw%3D%3D) I want to wish everyone a very happy, healthy and meaningful Easter and Passover – and to share some recent updates from the campaign trail. Last week, I had the privilege of speaking with community members at the VFW Museum of Military History in Simi Valley. Thank you to the Simi Valley-Moorpark Republican Women Federated for hosting this fantastic candidate forum! Also last week in Simi Valley, I had the pleasure of meeting with South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem at the Reagan Library, after she gave a rousing speech. "Super Saturday” was a blast at our Thousand Oaks headquarters. Thank you to our AMAZING supporters for coming out – and door knocking to spread our message in the community! After door knocking, we headed to Camarillo for a backyard meet-and-greet. Thank you to Veronica and Jeff Nettleton for hosting us at your beautiful home and bringing together such a great group! It was my honor to attend a recent fundraiser for the C4 Foundation – a fantastic nonprofit, established in memory of Navy SEAL Charles Keating IV, which provides important services to active Navy SEALs and their families. I also had the good fortune to spend time there with Congressman (and former Navy SEAL) Dan Crenshaw. On Tuesday morning, I joined Jennifer Horn and Grant Stinchfield on AM 870 The Morning Answer to talk about the campaign. You can listen to the full interview [**here**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=f931b953e3624a188a239edd564e100e&_e=nDWnLYNARpewzQelld3om01ZvlxarhcXpLWvL9DsIFKBTBr1XJdNeDw_V3aeCh8EyUjKuwLRN1DNT86wLh_JrHLMZR0q8eKqL8SEzIMgQP5v6FOeWNAcU7jnHL-qSd8IJxOXqzBY-Cli8nuQg0T14JBvt_1-Q1zPgKn_I8L1ew23c5BTZ-Dc1OIrZNSI0CQYxQY7EIszwvVbGcLir7CU-b7SBRzpv2BVrmHaAY-n4OP5-jbREn08hANQtmgp-67h5XiRDNaAdMcavT-RSuCshim0nYxJ_f88rhpvB1HK5PrYft84PLT3Yf2WU00G34zsudncZXSVBYScNu8WyBBP8VDBdVVF6DImSXv6l3CN3Z2TdGPX_gKdht9aVZhAzfh2Ej72dFRMfgPejBDuIV7S1DN0JSU6cWffiLFiP8_nPVvGsgCKdduPeSdPwpfQYWMO). I always enjoy visiting with the wonderful members of the Camarillo Republican Women Federated. Thank you for giving me the chance to speak to your group on Tuesday. The house was packed and the energy was off the charts! Also on Tuesday, I was honored to speak with — and receive the endorsement of — the Ventura County Republican Assembly. Thank you to the members of the VRCA for your faith in me. This holiday weekend is a meaningful time for my family, as I’m sure it is for yours. I wish everyone lots of health and happiness — and look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon! clean_body: I want to wish everyone a very happy, healthy and meaningful Easter and Passover – and to share some recent updates from the campaign trail. Last week, I had the privilege of speaking with community members at the VFW Museum of Military History in Simi Valley. Thank you to the Simi Valley-Moorpark Republican Women Federated for hosting this fantastic candidate forum! Also last week in Simi Valley, I had the pleasure of meeting with South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem at the Reagan Library, after she gave a rousing speech. "Super Saturday” was a blast at our Thousand Oaks headquarters. Thank you to our AMAZING supporters for coming out – and door knocking to spread our message in the community! After door knocking, we headed to Camarillo for a backyard meet-and-greet. Thank you to Veronica and Jeff Nettleton for hosting us at your beautiful home and bringing together such a great group! It was my honor to attend a recent fundraiser for the C4 Foundation – a fantastic nonprofit, established in memory of Navy SEAL Charles Keating IV, which provides important services to active Navy SEALs and their families. I also had the good fortune to spend time there with Congressman (and former Navy SEAL) Dan Crenshaw. On Tuesday morning, I joined Jennifer Horn and Grant Stinchfield on AM 870 The Morning Answer to talk about the campaign. You can listen to the full interview . I always enjoy visiting with the wonderful members of the Camarillo Republican Women Federated. Thank you for giving me the chance to speak to your group on Tuesday. The house was packed and the energy was off the charts! Also on Tuesday, I was honored to speak with — and receive the endorsement of — the Ventura County Republican Assembly. Thank you to the members of the VRCA for your faith in me. This holiday weekend is a meaningful time for my family, as I’m sure it is for yours. I wish everyone lots of health and happiness — and look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon! Sincerely, Matt | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. That's a bit better, but we can't let up. If you 're still on the fence, I'm asking that you please consider a donation this morning of ANY amount. We're in the lead now, but leads can fade in a heartbeat with motivated opponents. 📉 Can you help me maintain my lead in this race with a contribution this morning? yes,friend, this story is true, but we can fight back| | | Friend, Wanted to make sure you saw this. What they are trying to do here is unreal — but we have the opportunity to fight back. **Imagine pulling up to a gas station and seeing one state-mandated sign touting the Democrats’ “tax relief” ... but**** _“Sullivan for Illinois” on the bumper of every car!_** We can make it happen. _[**Get your bumper sticker now.**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a07a9b2d702148a5821dac4ff91f0306&_e=NoB2DOxptN4qADp4cM0j_W91PuorHiwTN7qsjGcXODpoUMY6JTSEJwMGw9vsyI0sMNGXPKIksgr-mRhYC89NgMZGALlb4BIbA7rL5_aVqxh9bMt_Yjoyk5G9IhZlPNPa-lhMtgExP1W1_mWNq5mh31sph29Ffzfp_G1_dU_KNEOVZ3KaMTWJBfMTzqzBH9aw_M7GkrzuERjPdmwbV2YPHr-wVaBm7q0lP9ClHni2Yk-ofuPBO_W_C0fy57j1OW6WeRS--DqyNo9PFD7t1VwEbnPncAbMq0tb67YR6nXup0UfZp6ZNsHu7yk5NLL5Tm7UtBpy1PsCzgeceAokk8ukHRkDKP_vMfPdWCmTRzSeSygtSjIkSGon2T0YuSxUkRQrLDaveHqaLK3F9VHsl8rM1gu4igCnYMXh-500LL3NA_A%3D)_ –Jesse

Friend, Illinois Democrats snuck something outrageous into the last legislative session.**_ _** **It’s bad enough that their tax “relief” consisted of only temporary, election-year suspensions of some of our state’s crushing taxes. But now****Governor Pritzker and the Dems are forcing gas stations to print campaign ads on their election-year gas tax gimmick.****_ _** If they refuse, they will have to pay a $500 fine ... EVERY DAY. Friend, let’s be clear: This is a violation of our First Amendment rights.**_ _** **_[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a07a9b2d702148a5821dac4ff91f0306&_e=NoB2DOxptN4qADp4cM0j_W91PuorHiwTN7qsjGcXODpoUMY6JTSEJwMGw9vsyI0sMNGXPKIksgr-mRhYC89NgMZGALlb4BIbA7rL5_aVqxh9bMt_Yjoyk5G9IhZlPNPa-lhMtgExP1W1_mWNq5mh31sph29Ffzfp_G1_dU_KNEOVZ3KaMTWJBfMTzqzBH9aw_M7GkrzuERjPdmwbV2YPHgXYQ2fraMuoH4EIMcrau523dxKTK8PwRDwIm2ig36A6z9Ti0lQGZ9PDx2Z6M6XOmRIT1z1qbep1OZxa3pxKlI3NuvlTv-gIFJgYu4PjGMwjiIorh7V6a_jZYttuFBn3hoUARS5dM1Gs6fBVo9QgzOMOPpVzesd_eO4JzJZWxcDGDYc6g-KicaWQDsa14sOzuIJxXgh3WY1ySQt-z2RtHu4%3D)[FIGHT BACK - SEND JESSE SULLIVAN TO SPRINGFIELD](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=a07a9b2d702148a5821dac4ff91f0306&_e=NoB2DOxptN4qADp4cM0j_W91PuorHiwTN7qsjGcXODpoUMY6JTSEJwMGw9vsyI0sMNGXPKIksgr-mRhYC89NgMZGALlb4BIbA7rL5_aVqxh9bMt_Yjoyk5G9IhZlPNPa-lhMtgExP1W1_mWNq5mh31sph29Ffzfp_G1_dU_KNEOVZ3KaMTWJBfMTzqzBH9aw_M7GkrzuERjPdmwbV2YPHiGeAZT3N0m3jmv73WTE1tVZab38v8fucwA6iMjHn5dWN7gbr88SfCiDCH_-oBsPdHl39-k-nFv_F044q22ZS_jEFvkv9RkwOA7SW0WqJr05hwHaY0df9SsuPxwXaeGLXBll_vN5XhZCElm1VxNJ8PDe3Z_GWkbny93nlJODSa2_lo6NK0Eje1FEX3OIK6u0ToMfm0ws94s2RItKncq5j54%3D)_** Governor Pritzker may be able to force business owners to put campaign ads on every gas pump, but we’ve got the people of Illinois with us. We know that real change will only come with new leadership in Springfield.****

|
#
---
Our work is about delivering lasting results for everyday Americans, folks. **I’m proud that we’re doing exactly that: delivering real, tangible results for people across Arizona, from Tribal communities to big cities and everywhere in between.** We’ve secured millions of dollars to expand access to affordable housing, especially for our seniors. We’re helping families afford their medication and bring down health care costs. We’re investing in clean energy and electric vehicle charging stations. And we’re securing our water future for Tribal communities, farmers, and Arizona residents. Knowing I can count on our team to support our work along the way means a lot to me and our campaign. It helps us plan ahead and budget how we use our resources to deliver for our state. **I’m committed to ensuring the Senate delivers for Arizonans and everyday Americans. I’m proud that we’re doing exactly that: delivering real, tangible results for people across Arizona, from Tribal communities to big cities and everywhere in between. We’ve secured millions of dollars to expand access to affordable housing, especially for our seniors. We’re helping families afford their medication and bring down health care costs. We’re investing in clean energy and electric vehicle charging stations. And we’re securing our water future for Tribal communities, farmers, and Arizona residents. Knowing I can count on our team to support our work along the way means a lot to me and our campaign. It helps us plan ahead and budget how we use our resources to deliver for our state. I’m committed to ensuring the Senate delivers for Arizonans and everyday Americans. Will you stand with me and chip in before tonight’s mid-April fundraising deadline and help us stay on track toward this month’s fundraising target? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I appreciate you, Kyrsten Sinema for Arizona P.O. Box 7586 Phoenix, AZ 85011-7586 United States | mailto:info@kyrstensinema.com | | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona

name: Derek Marshall
subject: 300,000+ workers are with us
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Derek Marshall is running in California's newly-created 23rd Congressional District, against incumbent Jay Obernolte, not Kevin McCarthy, who represents the former 23rd district. You may be receiving these emails because you've previously indicated you support progressive and Democratic candidates. Emails are the best way we update our supporters, but y ou can always unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/795080ae-0ebc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/bdec7242-9ebd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGVjNzI0Mi05ZWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4WTBo7R-f5pSowYr2FspE-RNUzQBFXpp1crR3-tXd6Q=&id=124407521 here.
Peter,
This month has been an absolute whirlwind–from our first Weekend of Action, to new press, to the endorsements flooding in, it’s clear this campaign is on fire. I am so proud of the work we have put in, and so grateful to the many, many volunteers, donors, and supporters like you that make this possible.
I have always said that this campaign is about the people. Working people. Because for far too long in this country, workers and working families have been left in the dust while wages stagnate, social services are gutted, and wealth inequality soars.
That’s why I am honored to announce that the Inland Empire Labor Council has JUST endorsed my campaign for Congress! Show your support and join them with a small donation now >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-15&amount=38]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/png_20220413_194934_0000.png]
This is a MAJOR endorsement. Together, the IELC includes over 80 affiliated union groups and represents more than 300,000 union members in the valley. Need I say more?
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1]
This is a huge stamp of approval for one of the most important constituencies in our region. With this endorsement, the IELC joins 8+ other organizations who have thrown their support behind our progressive movement here in California’s 23rd.
This endorsement just goes to show that the people of this district are READY for change and prepared to do what it takes to flip CA-23 blue! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1] If you agree that we need to flip this district from red to blue and are ready to invest in a people-powered movement, chip in any amount today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-15&amount=38] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-9&amount=38&recurring=1]

name: Peter Welch
subject: One of the best choices I ever made:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
When I graduated law school, I had a choice to work on K Street or on Wall Street. I ended up on Bridge Street instead.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
Hello,
When I graduated law school, my friends were choosing between working on K Street or on Wall Street. I ended up on Bridge Street in White River Junction instead.
I still remember my first-day-of-work jitters. I didn’t know anyone in town, but White River Junction became home. It’s where I started my career, and where I started to raise my family.
I got to know—and fell in love with—Vermont values: self-reliance, mutual support, and cooperation built on trust.
There’s so much to love about Vermont—I could talk about it all day. It’s the honor of my life to represent our state in Congress, and I’m proud to do it the Vermont way.
Now, I’m asking this team to come together to help ensure we keep this seat—and the Senate—in Democratic hands. There’s a lot on the line, and we have a lot of work to do.
[**That’s why I’m asking, if you can pitch in $15 to this all-important Senate race right away.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=3&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=14&amount=3&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=16&amount=15&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=18&amount=28&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=20&amount=50&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=10&amount=100&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=12&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---

---
I’ve seen Vermonters come together to solve problems. We focus on solutions, not who gets credit. **That’s the Vermont way.** That’s how I’ve gotten things done as Vermont’s congressman, and how I’ll get things done if I’m elected to the Senate.
Mitch McConnell and the Senate Republicans see things differently, to say the least. They divide people for their own political gain instead of working across the aisle to get things done for working families. They’re fighting for failure, and that won’t change if they retake the majority.
**I’m focused on ensuring Vermont’s working families can get quality, affordable childcare and paid family leave, passing a Green New Deal, lowering health care and prescription drug costs, enshrining the right to abortion, protecting voting rights and our democracy, and delivering results.**
**But we have to work together to win this race.**
[**If you can, please continue powering this Senate campaign with a $15 donation or anything you can spare today.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1808?t=7&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
Thanks so much,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22apr?refcode=em_20220416_f_p_bio&refcode2=247_61531_ZpW-Ff&akid=247%2E61531%2EZpW-Ff)
---

---

---|---|---

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477

name: Coach Lou Holtz
subject: Can our heroes count on you?
body:
| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13g7wCJsGVC43OTm_bHTMWgqcH8uywty99Nv8nVuULLMRGTD23KBcRmMjrQAJT7QGrH9fUoYtl838W4PO8xgMMFUx3lDCo3cn4cBJXr0s7k661Jz59Ij_XE07D-QNTETAAjhBTUDyVw7gJ1USwE4Gyj9Q_W0UG8IL_NWRdY0gr73XWWJEUsgBmG5gZWhDx1AFF8LBimX4ErYwtEh2n2nOQNg%3D)
---
| | Peter, You know me best as the former head football coach of the Notre Dame Fighting Irish and the South Carolina Gamecocks. But before I led six different college football programs to bowl games, I served in the military, like my father before me. I love this country. I love our freedom. And I love our way of life. Yet too often, we take America's blessings for granted and forget the supreme sacrifice of our fallen heroes -- men and women in the military who fought and died for our freedom. **This year, my friends at the American Veterans Center are again hosting the National Memorial Day Parade...the LARGEST Memorial Day event in America, with more than 5,000 veterans and service members marching in Washington, D.C.** [_**Will you help honor America's fallen heroes at this year's National Memorial Day Parade by sending a tax-deductible donation of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13m1MBXriN98RhoWdUf2jWgmsdkrMZEnwoDbccgTUzR5ALtzrGksWxLBSYUsvxyPGN-HdtHM5CzaarWLbNtsauTmZI69uD2MQ4KSn8BDqPldrReO6JH5IgoZCLgYRNh2i6rU11swkKy6bD2SeNT--KCp8m9dHWE2PNXbX_hKjiWBkmePbQY_yJstRyTLdUmC2l4mTp51LSaxqJVnq2nppwxg%3D)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13ljMrKWHLFl_kfefd6VqO2DCBoY8e5N-OgaUk3HhPNnNSTrBwX42lcHrelkAwfCzQyNHoR3WJW7ZTMVQzZyWtJ_mAVhD-GyO7uriIowdjlgHke8YgD2m_KIGS0d3-SFKYjk91RXn-grvoQePCBPiNiBpl7X_24pDRjUQcT5bUSZMAhn3_C3LUqBLSSsVPVLj8i_0vbZAnbHxjZwm7dX_GqU%3D)
---
If you've ever attended, watched on TV, or heard about this parade before, then you know that it is America's most spectacular and beloved Memorial Day celebration.
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13oQJFrQYuMPPhGDjA3fASSWctiro5kzNbZk9fTaWSbEW4aiU8AC4M2NFOF06373FrAlCS41TWx5Rp8o_PbCQTQzy_ajknvSu0CRQ0VoEuyTUiW8xTYBUwo_mv67W3NDzljNwTcYOidWGS8iFFk3tlGo_k0NYRBgYHeJUaorSLaWRgk88XPYLlOCjpz7_CLhZmZwmYW7phu1VuDh0YrZs3gY%3D)
---
|
---
| | Greeting troops at the 2019 Memorial Day Parade
---
The National Memorial Day Parade brings together more than 5,000 veterans and service members to march in the event. It welcomes more than 200,000 patriotic Americans to the live event on Constitution Avenue in D.C. And it records and broadcasts this special and exciting ceremony for millions more. _But the American Veterans Center can only put on this important event with YOUR help._ [**Please join me in supporting this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today. If you ask me, that's a small price to pay to properly honor those who died defending our country, freedom, and way of life.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13oWBp-F8WcS6ktDpXqdNVoO37FjQVdMGnUd9AlYFsWlSxdhEjCFDPObJ6uBvrOSoHOIgrGtq0yxiTIU685OK1hv3RxJJQ_i11SPQ4s4ZPT4ZCyu0IpSk93DZ1j81BrKdS56NWqtc9Itd08jnwaYxOxEGQayxZ586RQyIfozOEqgKCFqiqQw-yRbUaub0GAFGsa2osq-AUNpLgKjzpKvrp9k%3D)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13tPlW7Z7ExQbSNXcRcHM98_Lrp-ucCcUAWtJsBLKD5_JCwjqeZHFfdF2Ipb-Dgo2D_16i0WAhD6nm8QgDnPE5Vot238-GYbK8jckUdywVufzOGeRH2n4HjmkjY6k-ns1y4ARBGjhZ25rHl31BimnIOV1xHsKzoY6L7ROXxYu_vldsyPXm6I64kKglPOazcEFsWywRyQ9J3vZGWoFKJwTfJM%3D)
---
Peter, like many Americans, I grew up in a family of military service. My father served in World War II and fought in the Battle of Midway, Iwo Jima, and many of the other major battles in the Pacific. He was one of the lucky ones who returned home, while many of his brothers-in-arms did not. Because of my father's sacrifices and the values he taught me, I joined the Army where I served as an Army Field Artillery Officer.
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13gfgUqnVp81yyk4TVven4-TTWkXMAwyfOX2CDsVlFFHFfB8y8oxZI870fqEHRlqoGx0_20aMIkXAbrI4_7n6whqCu4JK7-CQWzAx1gPbXmopDD900RiqzY_WqpFYDUYDh5A7hEzMhvOl7BtZerdg3qrB6ql1AWIoxb-3lVO-zQ6eNFPoJMzLGoO9ldUS0fw4YHgpoAKpGcDkTGrV8_FOXeY%3D)
---
I learned so many lessons in the military which became the foundation of everything I did in life. But I wouldn't have had the opportunity to do what I love -- coach football for 44 years -- if it weren't for the brave men and women who gave the last full measure of devotion and died for our freedom to do what we love. I know you haven't forgotten these heroes' sacrifice. And neither have my friends at the American Veterans Center, who work every day to protect the legacy of those who served our country. [**That’s why I'm asking for your immediate support of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more to make possible this year's National Memorial Day Parade -- the largest Memorial Day event in America.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13swrr0kOe7bsp0CkeZIC0rRawW2zrDholuOYFiJtAazuiUkylUYPSevDvfVDJ1jcFAebT22i5u_-drVjYb5xj_1wLCf4qC8ftoc2fCJfzjaWIxK7ns1BLf1qWHYQ6k0FdsA-SEePMSAMzIJItOSHKhS9DIjqIk_BXFfN6zZ8P663f_B-QYNKmzcnSR3vFX-lIVnp4Nl0s_RDeFBLG4_4pLg%3D)
---
[**Honor Our Heroes Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13kFEzxUiD6b5vMnxOPV_CBkcb9vdYhZ5U99qmcc6BxiDZvh4w4IYgjTEF3ucBmYpw7WPgSxlFNDCm99EYu8u8-1Dl4dIQzANb0Dvs0OYEgk2atiGtAInPGk4Lyq1w3Wj2NalfZsQBSS07uE0p_Oh0gYojCDXfoAp53ZNlRYhmvxWYHVohQJYq6amKr0MntJh8hx7JMuPHc6P36YjfGBuBn4%3D)
---
I wouldn't ask for your help if the American Veterans Center didn't need it. And I wouldn't ask for your support of the National Memorial Day Parade if I didn't think it was so important to our nation's heroes. Your gift today will help the American Veterans Center bring the National Memorial Day Parade back to its full scale for the first time since the pandemic ... and it will ensure the American Veterans Center can continue its important year-round work of recording veterans' stories and educating the public and our young people about their service. [**Peter****, I'm counting on you to help the American Veterans Center host this year's National Memorial Day Parade with your tax-deductible gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, or more today.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13s570mZByZaWIeGAwbjE9J7f9ThZ3cFFefs7JcF8Ql3TEGBWRXh6rvjkjNwdTjQAlMPduInT599wXWEkS7maAhOVny9A1LxoVqyh4-Qm2kvG2ARuGuQcnI2_WMho3xFkVaJrRT5F5IFW0MMCpYlDrSylWUKB2fTyPmtoL5Tfa7D78o4MbroE3dPcwKjjw9ZsHhWT9YQAEdiAYBL48BelU_s%3D) Only you know how much you are able to give, and every dollar you can contribute will make a difference for this important cause. I hope to hear from you today -- **[please make your urgently needed gift now.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13smki3auzFUCKYKQr_Y7qRbl3iU33XoH6gcJUnK0mIRCo127TFjl3bAf0hT1F8QmZdD6NVWrPoacKM3od1tugDT-6tn3OKX-i7SKQ6vupTcwP5DyCJUy4yF4UgESo9iwTeexQS9LUtAG8qqfAzB_7-Ns4ELGrAOvuvgD6V_UQm2YzeqhKLivZoMxeqaA1FTgoAZW1JqrIGX5uNQB93AUrOg%3D)** Warmest regards, Coach Lou Holtz
---
| | [**Support the American Veterans Center Today**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ddc3652cd01c49e58a30a680e2d419f1&_e=fUaS6EluuxagRqsoJ8FoA38NxFasQu1_YwawvbA4vgeYsMVwN56OlBLMbY_LnKYlxiQS7bPZUapt23LpufQ9vgDfMLzaKcgY41y88IMrJ-6KpulvGbrV88f5SWbKjqSIORX4WRXpQ808-BaYHzx13sBMHJX7RzaDYuvK76wy-w5YxA6qHloAlKxZjfmEcxu_GOfqXaTEQOX9bo0dH_vVIDP5ozlxrASY17MLmMVCznxwp1XZRRSpqxTB012VrByH46qmU6xldl_9P3MP9vEaYuJ-eSfKB1K0dyZGTe2vaAdCU61StRyH_W9M1mG40Id7-00cPLA7cbZ_lRvLE10EBRIf_fEkyvqS1uYVbbIpNHw%3D)

name: Team MLG
subject: Campaign Updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
Welcome back to another Team MLG Update
| | |
---
_Hi, Peter! Welcome back to another Team MLG Update. We're excited to share updates on our grassroots campaign and Gov. Lujan Grisham's work here for the Land of Enchantment._
|
---
|
---
**New Mexico Democratic Convention**
The Democratic Party of New Mexico recently came together for our official nominating convention in Roswell. The campaign season is now in full swing, and it's so important that Democrats come together to win up and down the ballot.

At this year's convention, Gov. Lujan Grisham urged Democratic voters to show up at the polls to support all of our incredible candidates.

|
---
**Cannabis Is Now in Stores**
Adult-use cannabis is officially for sale in New Mexico! The first weekend of adult-use sales totaled a massive $5.2 million – more than even neighboring Colorado's opening weekend sales. Gov. Lujan Grisham is proud to have led the way on legalizing adult-use cannabis and to have overseen such a successful and record-breaking opening day.

This is an incredible win for New Mexico's economy. The new adult-use cannabis industry will continue to create more revenue and new jobs for our state.
|
---
**Protect Reproductive Rights**
In recent months, many of our neighboring states, like Texas, have passed radical anti-abortion laws. Now Oklahoma has joined their ranks, passing a near-total ban on abortions. With a far-right majority on the U.S. Supreme Court, it's never been more important for Governors to protect the right to choose.

That's why last year, Gov. Lujan Grisham signed Senate Bill 10, which repealed a state statute from 1969 that criminalized abortion. Even as Republicans launch more attacks against our reproductive rights, Gov. Lujan Grisham will _always_ defend the right to choose.
|
---
**Free Higher Education for Everyone**
Gov. Lujan Grisham has made affordable, high-quality education a key pillar of her work as Governor. Just last month, she was proud to sign legislation making higher education tuition-free for everyone in New Mexico – regardless of citizenship status or age.

This law is a critical step forward in Gov. Lujan Grisham's efforts to provide relief, support, and opportunities for working families in our state.
|
---
**Follow Us on Social Media**
Follow us at [**@Michelle4NM**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44211532/340576791/-2133875671?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDYzMzBmNS05ZWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo66qcX-xOL_rIZVW0MjCn8WSb7rSQCOwVzQcFH6vEA=&emci=d44e5040-21bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=646330f5-9ebd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Twitter, [**@michellelujangrisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44211533/340576792/-1369115094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDYzMzBmNS05ZWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo66qcX-xOL_rIZVW0MjCn8WSb7rSQCOwVzQcFH6vEA=&emci=d44e5040-21bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=646330f5-9ebd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352)** ** on Instagram, or [**Michelle Lujan Grisham**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44211534/340576793/1915716596?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDYzMzBmNS05ZWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qo66qcX-xOL_rIZVW0MjCn8WSb7rSQCOwVzQcFH6vEA=&emci=d44e5040-21bb-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=646330f5-9ebd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24265352) on Facebook to stay in the loop on the latest from our team.
|

name: MarkWarnerVA.com
subject: Look what Mitch McConnell has to say
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We have to do everything we can to protect our majority.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44216207/340602733/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTVlYjkwMi1jM2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEszlOdugsrLUzaZRqqT-8BhE6cmMucHoAjK4uwvp3E=&emci=7e8c3bc7-f6bc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=f15eb902-c3bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Earlier this week, Mitch McConnell was asked what he thought of Democrats’ chances this November. Here’s what he had to say: "I think they’re headed toward a pretty good beating in the fall election." body:
Every day, dollar, and voice counts.
#
We will keep this brief, Peter.
For 2022 and beyond, Democrats and Republicans are **promising** very different futures.
Sen. Durbin and his colleagues have been working overtime to make child care more affordable, defend reproductive rights, and bring down essential costs. It’s how we can build back stronger and fairer from this pandemic.
**[Will you chip in $5 now to help us defend the Senate and continue the fight for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212096/340579870/-1716504305?refcode=dd_em_220416_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU4NmQ3NC1hMmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjE6_mx4hsRub0C1CXW3N5XZPA6YZkdepOJUicylqVk=)**
But if you look at the plans Senate Republicans are rolling out, **you get a _very_ different picture.** Mitch McConnell’s GOP is promising tax hikes on workers, families, retirees, students, and more. They’re (again) seeking to repeal Obamacare and end Social Security and Medicare – decisions that would jeopardize the financial stability of families across this country.
We can’t let them.
**[The difference couldn’t be clearer: if we want to build on our progress and pass the type of commonsense legislation that helps out working families and levels the playing field, we need to defend our Senate majority. Chip in $5 now and let’s get to work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212097/340579871/-1716504305?refcode=dd_em_220416_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjU4NmQ3NC1hMmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xjE6_mx4hsRub0C1CXW3N5XZPA6YZkdepOJUicylqVk=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

name: Beto for Texas
subject: Your next grocery trip
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
We need to fire Greg Abbott.
#
Greg Abbott just caused a massive trade slowdown at the border — driving up our grocery prices and torching the Texas economy. **Will you act now to support our campaign to fire Greg Abbott and elect Beto?** **[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55520?refcode=ema20220416-185303&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=185303%2E444211%2ESimBDK)**
---
U.S. grocery shoppers have been warned to expect higher prices and even empty store shelves in the coming days. You might be one of them.
So you should know there’s only one person to blame: **Greg Abbott.**
Abbott’s latest political stunt at the border caused a _massive_ slowdown in key U.S. supply chains. Earlier this week, trucks carrying produce across the busiest trade crossing in the Rio Grande Valley — which usually sees up to $70 million daily in American imports — came to a standstill. Now, some of our grocery stores are running dry.
It’s hard to overstate the problems caused by Greg Abbott’s border stunt. By injecting chaos into an already-stressed supply chain, Abbott is driving up inflation, hurting businesses, and even jeopardizing jobs in Texas.
There's a pretty clear pattern here. **Greg Abbott will always make us pay the price.** Whether he’s inflating our grocery bills with political stunts at the border, or driving up Texans’ utility bills with his corrupt handling of the power grid crisis,**he just doesn’t care when Texans get hurt.**
[We need your help to stop Greg Abbott; our economy and our livelihoods are on the line in this race. Donate $3 or whatever you can right now to help us elect Beto and defeat Greg Abbott in November. ](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55520?refcode=ema20220416-185303&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=25&akid=185303%2E444211%2ESimBDK)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/55520?refcode=ema20220416-185303&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=44&akid=185303%2E444211%2ESimBDK)**
We need a governor who keeps the lights on, keeps the shelves stocked, and never hurts the people of Texas just to score cheap political points. We need to do everything in our power to fire Greg Abbott.
Thank you so much for taking action today,

Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220416-185303-footer&t=45&refcode2=185303_444211_SimBDK&akid=185303%2E444211%2ESimBDK)**
---

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Welcome aboard, Friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
I noticed you decided to join our community here, and I wanted to reach out and welcome you to the team. Here at RAP, we're working hard to remake the party into something Reagan would recognize.
|
---
Hello there,

I was in my basement, sitting on my couch, nursing an IPA that I never finished when I realized that Trump would become President of the United States. I’d been involved with the Republican Party for my whole life. A new GOP president was supposed to make me optimistic.**Instead, I felt nauseous.** A lot has happened since that night—endless embarrassments at home and abroad, a global pandemic, an election that was way, way too close, and an attempted insurrection. But I've never forgotten how I felt. I’m Sarah Longwell, founder and Executive Director of the Republican Accountability Project. I started RAP because I understood that Donald Trump was a cancer on the Republican Party—a cancer that has now metastasized and continues to damage the country. At RAP, we’re committed to making sure no Republican escapes the choices they made. By joining our network, you've joined the fight to protect democracy from those who sought to overturn an election, who put partisanship over the Constitution and party over country. We’re glad you’ve joined our email list and our community. We’ll be in touch over the next few days with more information about who we are and what we do. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project
---

clean_body: I noticed you decided to join our community here, and I wanted to reach out and welcome you to the team. Here at RAP, we're working hard to remake the party into something Reagan would recognize. | Hello there, I was in my basement, sitting on my couch, nursing an IPA that I never finished when I realized that Trump would become President of the United States. I’d been involved with the Republican Party for my whole life. A new GOP president was supposed to make me optimistic.Instead, I felt nauseous. A lot has happened since that night—endless embarrassments at home and abroad, a global pandemic, an election that was way, way too close, and an attempted insurrection. But I've never forgotten how I felt. I’m Sarah Longwell, founder and Executive Director of the Republican Accountability Project. I started RAP because I understood that Donald Trump was a cancer on the Republican Party—a cancer that has now metastasized and continues to damage the country. At RAP, we’re committed to making sure no Republican escapes the choices they made. By joining our network, you've joined the fight to protect democracy from those who sought to overturn an election, who put partisanship over the Constitution and party over country. We’re glad you’ve joined our email list and our community. We’ll be in touch over the next few days with more information about who we are and what we do. Sarah Longwell Executive Director, Republican Accountability Project | | | | | | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER. name: Max Steiner
subject: LaMalfa Voted Against Naming a Courthouse After an African American Judge
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212361/340582106/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTtnQzuSVDsxFDg2g7TQw05-ifN12ncjJ2plaGGY0oA=)
Friend,

LaMalfa added another shameful chapter to his long list of reprehensible votes this week when he voted against naming a Florida courthouse after a pioneering African American Judge. Justice Joseph Hatchett was the first black judge to serve on a federal appeals court in the former confederacy -- taking the bar in 1959 while he was still subject to the restrictions of Jim Crow laws.

Naming the courthouse in honor of Justice Hatchett should have been a no-brainer, even for a Republican Party that increasingly votes along racial lines. The bill originally had the support of the entire Floridian congressional delegation (bipartisan) and was sponsored by Marco Rubio in the Senate. Instead, in the aftermath of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s historic confirmation to the Supreme Court, 89% of the GOP decided that naming a courthouse after a pioneering African American justice was not something their base would approve of.

**The modern GOP is a disgrace. Abraham Lincoln is turning in his grave.**

Public servants like Justice Hatchett were born into a life where the deck was stacked against them, but they took that adversity, overcame it, and made America better through their service. Doug LaMalfa was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and his idea of “public service” is finding ways to grift more money from taxpayers for his inherited rice farm.

As your representative, I would vote to honor the innumerable contributions of pioneering African Americans like Justice Hatchett and Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson. Our nation was forged by people of all colors and all creeds, who refused to let prejudice stand in the way of their success.

**[If you're ready to stand up to right-wing extremists like Doug LaMalfa, help fund our campaign by chipping in today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212362/340582107/-96927706?refcode=em-4.16.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTtnQzuSVDsxFDg2g7TQw05-ifN12ncjJ2plaGGY0oA=)**

Thanks for hearing me out,

clean_body: | = Friend, LaMalfa added another shameful chapter to his long list of reprehensible votes this week when he voted against naming a Florida courthouse after a pioneering African American Judge. Justice Joseph Hatchett was the first black judge to serve on a federal appeals court in the former confederacy -- taking the bar in 1959 while he was still subject to the restrictions of Jim Crow laws. Naming the courthouse in honor of Justice Hatchett should have been a no-brainer, even for a Republican Party that increasingly votes along racial lines. The bill originally had the support of the entire Floridian congressional delegation (bipartisan) and was sponsored by Marco Rubio in the Senate. Instead, in the aftermath of Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s historic confirmation to the Supreme Court, 89% of the GOP decided that naming a courthouse after a pioneering African American justice was not something their base would approve of. The modern GOP is a disgrace. Abraham Lincoln is turning in his grave. Public servants like Justice Hatchett were born into a life where the deck was stacked against them, but they took that adversity, overcame it, and made America better through their service. Doug LaMalfa was born with a silver spoon in his mouth and his idea of “public service” is finding ways to grift more money from taxpayers for his inherited rice farm. As your representative, I would vote to honor the innumerable contributions of pioneering African Americans like Justice Hatchett and Supreme Court Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson. Our nation was forged by people of all colors and all creeds, who refused to let prejudice stand in the way of their success. = Thanks for hearing me out, Max If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. From speaking at podiums to marching in parades, it’s been a busy month on the campaign trail. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212484/340582444/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=) Friend, It’s hard to believe we’re already halfway through April. The past few weeks have been jam packed with events, meet and greets, parades, and even [**filming our very first TV ad for the campaign**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212485/340582445/-1294259538?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=). Time is truly flying by. Below are a few pictures from some of my favorite moments this past month on the campaign trail. If you have any questions about our campaign, please feel free to respond to this email directly. I hope you enjoy the updates, and can’t thank you enough for your support! Cora | **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212486/340582446/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)**
---
* * *

**I got the chance to speak at the 2022 Mansfield Metcalf Dinner. It was a great opportunity to talk about the issues our state is facing as we head into this election season. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212487/340582447/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=) **Our team took a tour of the Missoula Fire Sciences Lab and learned more about the nature of fire, and the importance of prescribed burning, logging, and how to keep our communities safe and our forests healthy. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212489/340582449/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)
**I had the good fortune of touring the Montana Food Bank Network facilities in Missoula. MFBN is our only state-wide food bank, and has developed several programs to address the unique challenges of food access for Montana residents.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212491/340582451/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)
**Walking in the Butte St. Patrick’s Day Parade was a moment I won’t soon forget. It was so great to enjoy the sunshine and celebrate such a fun holiday with local community members. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212493/340582453/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)
**A behind the scenes look on the set of our first TV ad shoot for the campaign. I’m so grateful to every person who helped make this ad happen, and I couldn’t be happier with how it turned out. **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212495/340582455/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)
[**With the Montana primary just over a month away, my team is working overtime to get the word out about our campaign and have a great turnout on Election Day. We’re hoping to raise $23,462 by the end of the month, could you chip in just $3 to help us out?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212497/340582457/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)
As always, I so appreciate your continued generosity and support.
_Cora_
**[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44212499/340582459/-10092236?refcode=em-4.17.22-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODE4NWFhOC1hNmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7VotujNFG5furCWMeLft5putQzTLQlnuWnJGsxKAhzg=)**

We would like to report anything else, but it's true. _Joe and Kamala have not batted an eye in the direction of closing our Southern Border and**we do not believe they ever will.**_
**So, like everything else,_it’s up to us._**

**_Fellow Patriot, if we do not work together to close the wall, we will continue to see floods of illegal immigrants and surges of crime, drugs, and violence in our communities._**

clean_body: The Numbers only get worse | ALERT: The Border is Still Open | We would like to report anything else, but it's true. Joe and Kamala have not batted an eye in the direction of closing our Southern Border andwe do not believe they ever will. So, like everything else,it’s up to us. Fellow Patriot, if we do not work together to close the wall, we will continue to see floods of illegal immigrants and surges of crime, drugs, and violence in our communities. We are disappointed with this administration, but know that if we do what we can, we can make sure that President Trump’s border wall can be finished for good. An open border will create lasting, irreparable damage to our country and its future. This cannot wait. We are counting on you, Patriot. Southern Border Alerts Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:

| | |
---
**This is important,****folks: NPR just called Maggie's seat one of the "most likely to flip," which means that every single move we make in this campaign could be the difference between winning and losing in November.**

Maggie knows a thing or two about tough fights: That's why we're preparing to do _everything we can_ to reach _every single voter in New Hampshire ahead of November_ , including digital ads to encourage folks to register to vote and turn out to the polls in support of Maggie.

But reaching all corners of the Granite State with these ads will require resources, which is why we're reaching out to you today. In order to get our next round of ads live, we need to raise $15,000 today. And we're counting on our best supporters — folks like you — to help us reach that goal.

name: Kevin Kiley
subject: A Huge Victory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Huge Win](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioo90SeIbEvG0lpMoK2UuOGT&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr16_final&n=1) We have defeated SB 871, the student vaccine mandate, with the bill never receiving a single vote. What’s more, we have forced Gavin Newsom to back down. Things happened very quickly on Thursday. Shortly after I sent you the post about how we almost had the bill killed, the author made it official. He acknowledged he would not try to move it forward. I then released a statement calling on Newsom to rescind his own mandate immediately. For once, the Governor listened; shortly thereafter, he called it off. One headline read: “Student Vaccine Mandates Fall Like Dominoes.” Technically, Newsom says the mandate is "delayed" to July 2023, but in my opinion, that’s a way to save face. For all intents and purposes, it’s gone. This decision is back where it belongs: in the hands of parents. This comes six months after Newsom announced the mandate, trumpeting California as the “first state.” As time passed, we remained the _only_ state. His grandiose hopes of “leading” the nation were shattered when no one followed. In a governorship replete with humiliation, this may be Newsom's biggest embarrassment to date. And it effectively ends the era of one-man rule in California. If anyone says your voice as a citizen doesn’t matter, we are proving them wrong. Even in the most corrupt Capitol, even under the yoke of an endless "State of Emergency,” we are fighting back and winning. And we’re just getting started. [Help me continue the fight](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr16_final&n=2) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAzeUYsMp1Qn63ye71B6-QiT__Gm2aOr9jh8Xrxl32vK2A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr16_final&n=3) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=apr16_final&n=4).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Lopez?=
subject: I need your help. It's time to double down on our winning!
body:
We are less than 60 days away from our primary and then it’s head-to-head with Jared Polis. It's going to take all of us chipping in to flip Colorado.

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=daed022d7e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_16_05_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-daed022d7e-584862049
Colorado State Assembly, April 9, 2022

Good afternoon,

Winning the top of the ticket for the primary last Saturday at the State Assembly was a big win for our campaign and for Colorado.

I am running to be a different kind of governor who is One of Us for All of Us with a vision to unite our party and our state!

My career as a servant leader with executive governing experience and our unifying message is one that appeals not only to Republican voters but to the majority of Colorado voters who are Unaffiliated and Democrats.

I am committed to making communities safe again by being tough on crime. All of us should feel safe in our pursuit of life, liberty, and happiness.

My administration will protect our schools by working with school boards to improve public schools by putting academics over activism. We will bring back vocational training, expand the charter network, introduce a new voucher program, and support homeschooling.

We will quickly enact policies to increase the amount of hard-earned money that you keep in your pocket and encourage local trade with agriculture and small business. This plan will extend to the energy sector to help us reduce costs now that Colorado has become one of the highest cost-of-living states in our country!

We are less than 60 days away from our primary and then it’s head-to-head with Jared Polis. The opposition is well-funded by the powerful elite. We are not. It's going to take all of us chipping in to get back to the Colorado way of life.

Please help our campaign keep this great momentum going by getting involved or donating today. (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=daed022d7e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_16_05_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-daed022d7e-584862049)
DONATE NOW (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=daed022d7e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_16_05_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-daed022d7e-584862049)
Together we can put People Over Politics and win!

Sincerely,
Greg Lopez

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=daed022d7e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_04_16_05_20&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-daed022d7e-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.

name: Val Demings
subject: winning Florida requires your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
We can’t afford to have our momentum stall out and lose this opportunity
| | |
---
Friend,
I want to be clear: I cannot win Florida without you. **And with Election Day only months away, every fundraising goal I have between now and November is critical – but right now I’m falling short of my Mid Month fundraising goal. **
For months I’ve been trailing a few points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, **but** **NPR just named Rubio the second-most vulnerable Senate Republican, and The Miami Times says that I’m closing the polling gap!**

**I******’** m on the brink of surging ahead, but I need to hit each and every fundraising goal to do so. name: Team Franchot
subject: Just making sure you saw this!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Hi Peter,
We just wanted to make sure you got Peter’s recent email about our upcoming Campaign Rally. On April 23, we’re excited to speak with voters at the Tucker Road Athletic Complex in Fort Washington.
This will be an action-packed event with fun for the whole family, featuring food, drink, music, and special guests from around the state. The event is completely free, so be sure to bring your friends, family, and children!
Click here to RSVP for our Campaign Rally on April 23. We hope to see you there! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
Thank you,
Team Franchot
Forwarded Message Below:
In case you missed it, I just wanted to make sure you knew about our upcoming Campaign Rally in Fort Washington! On Saturday, April 23, Monique and I are excited to share our bold vision for the future of Maryland with voters. This will be a free, family-friendly event, and everyone's invited!
https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
As we enter the final stretch of this competitive primary race, our people-powered movement continues to gain momentum. Recent polls have shown that we are leading the rest of the field by a strong margin, and we’ve received the endorsements of over 100 current and former elected officials and labor unions – the most of any candidate for Governor. And we’re excited to announce more support in the days ahead!
I hope to see you on April 23, so make sure to RSVP and mark your calendar! Whether your top issue is lowering healthcare costs, creating new jobs, combating the student debt crisis, or something else, I’d love to meet with you in person to talk about the bold future we can build together.
Our Rally will be held at the Tucker Road Athletic Complex in Fort Washington, from 1:00 PM to 3:00 PM. Click here to RSVP. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/ppo_YoIYkUKqmayznTxtXA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?amount=20.22&refcode=em041622]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/050e6f17-6eb7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/d9c5d305-afbd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWM1ZDMwNS1hZmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X6idD7JsWfnyMexJi2Sr7gHg0bIU6hMe1vjUmVNgwnk=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter, I know it’s Saturday, so this will be quick.
**We're still short of where we want to be for our mid-month fundraising goal.** Because we’re in a critical midterm election year, it's even more imperative that we reach every fundraising goal we set for this campaign.
**I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important.** The money raised from emails like this helps keep me in Congress, fighting for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice. I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money — supporters and donors like you are the beating heart of our movement.
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now to help us hit our mid-month goal of 1,000 contributions before midnight? No matter the amount you can give, it makes a big difference.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12387?refcode=em20220416-1189&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1189%2E420207%2EXV2PFh)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/12387?refcode=em20220416-1189&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=1189%2E420207%2EXV2PFh)**
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our people-first movement for bold and transformative change.
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220416-1189-footer&t=21&refcode2=1189_420207_XV2PFh&akid=1189%2E420207%2EXV2PFh)**

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Agriculture Alerts (via Team Shedd)
subject: Protecting Our Five C’s
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
See why Arizona ag community is so important Friend, As an Arizonan, you’ve heard about Arizona’s five C’s: cotton, copper, cattle, citrus, and climate. These five C’s are the driving force behind our economy, our state, and our way of life. [**Add Your Name: Stand up for American Agriculture!**](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=df76d3c31cf14f8886e59c8834218db1&_e=rHuQuLEtCGPgDpZZAPMvrHOOznxh6Dejxb2dFtTYzLt6CkM8QH71Wl3zBV_AHdLbBLXe_Ve0zo40G_5Q9XUvQJGUbqgWCWVIXXXqP95GqSAdR8fTcgdGb6xJbN0v520g9V4-DZJCtN4OmSCMPTIKRIa7dzmWmO56CzwUk2GIgUZZvzhpk_knC8sEkDMTSAWMxiGqEw84n68cR2EU_NVNuPKrDt_PMYJs31emLnTD1XNTSpNo7RCpzapk5wh9sWIImBvVOn0iJt0chfakHaU7Wkb2F7pQYLa_2bROLFX_H0xjScvq0hTZw70wc7JthdqaQxJWtleaPQsEGkzc_nOVIiQRXakmWxsB6W73BLuyKOo4RTJhcnHAn1xm33dYdO2fawlfXb1rC2ouS5jlMOwbdCzEi0aqxhcyzftyLyvCebXb96ZQYOCbetPmxlRRPitlRisF19O_OgL6c1LfJO6gEEc8eJiGoWxslV0gtxoSd_Mr4NJEhduuM4jvA9k-qKQB) Sadly, regulations and restrictions from environmentalists and their cronies in the Biden Administration have made it **harder than ever** for Arizonans to produce crops and livestock. Our robust economy is undercut every day by the left’s attacks on American agriculture and we are at risk for food shortages and the loss of American Food Independence. Proposals such as Democrats’ Green New Deal will undoubtedly regulate our family farms and ranches **OUT OF EXISTENCE** , and the rising cost of energy will make profitable agriculture unsustainable. clean_body: See why Arizona ag community is so important Friend, As an Arizonan, you’ve heard about Arizona’s five C’s: cotton, copper, cattle, citrus, and climate. These five C’s are the driving force behind our economy, our state, and our way of life. Sadly, regulations and restrictions from environmentalists and their cronies in the Biden Administration have made it harder than ever for Arizonans to produce crops and livestock. Our robust economy is undercut every day by the left’s attacks on American agriculture and we are at risk for food shortages and the loss of American Food Independence. Proposals such as Democrats’ Green New Deal will undoubtedly regulate our family farms and ranches OUT OF EXISTENCE , and the rising cost of energy will make profitable agriculture unsustainable. Now, more than ever, Arizona’s farmers need a champion to represent them in court. That’s why Tiffany is running. As a family farmer and natural resource lawyer, she’s pushed back against government regulations that were harming her community, and as our Attorney General, she’ll do the same. Tiffany has earned the endorsements of many border ranchers and farmers because she knows putting Arizona first means protecting our agriculture industry. She’s all in to win and support Arizonans who are the backbone of our state’s economy. Are you? Thank you, Team Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. name: Rebecca Parson
subject: They’ve spent 1 year on strike. Can you help them out?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Miners at the Warrior Met Coal Mine have been on strike for a YEAR. [**Can you donate here to help feed their kids and keep the lights on?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217434/340609647/-1882563054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwZGZiZC1kN2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFrZBUoI7z1Pn_q0XDJV6IxjaMYkr9LL6oHSSh1-14w=) Some of these miners have had to pick up work at an Amazon warehouse. (Incidentally, that warehouse has been trying to unionize for over a year.) Why have the miners been on strike for a year? Because to save the mine from bankruptcy a few years ago, they agreed to a temporary reduction of wages and benefits and loss of their pensions. But those wages, benefits, and pensions never came back. The company, Warrior Met, broke its promise. Since then, _Labor Notes_ reports that “the union calculates that workers have forked over $1.1 billion in pay, overtime, vacation, safety, health care, and other benefits.” The largest shareholder in Warrior Met is BlackRock, the largest private equity firm in the US. (This is the same BlackRock that made the news for buying up every single-family home they could find for 20-50% above asking price, pricing out regular buyers.) Somehow BlackRock has the money to pay its CEO $30 million a year but it can’t afford to pay its miners a living wage and pensions? I don’t think so. Corporate greed is running rampant in our country, and I’m running for Congress to fight back against it. One way YOU can help fight back right now is by giving to the miners’ strike fund: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/miners**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217435/340609648/-1882563054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjkwZGZiZC1kN2JkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zFrZBUoI7z1Pn_q0XDJV6IxjaMYkr9LL6oHSSh1-14w=) I will send 100% of your donation to the strike fund, just like Bernie Sanders does when he raises money for striking workers. Thank you for standing in solidarity with these workers ✊ -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411
---

| I’ll get right to it, Peter.

Our team is short of where we need to be to reach our April mid-month fundraising goal.

I hate asking for money. It's awkward, and it’s not how I was raised. **But, I would not ask for your help if it was not so important. Your support is vital to the success of our campaign — and our ability to flip New York’s 22nd District from red to blue.**

| | I’ve had it.

At least [**TEN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217849/340611301/1694517773?refcode=20220416_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODI5MDVmNS1kOGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=krD-WqOPXdNegUudz7wGuO51xAScbUGKgiIAm12E7rA=) people involved in the Capitol rallies were elected to office.

And Republicans only need**[ FIVE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217851/340611303/1694517773?refcode=20220416_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODI5MDVmNS1kOGJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=krD-WqOPXdNegUudz7wGuO51xAScbUGKgiIAm12E7rA=)** seats to topple our Democratic Majority.

clean_body: | | ~ I’m horrified. My GOP opponent is fundraising by auctioning off a semi-automatic rifle: | ~ ---|--- Gun violence in NC-4 and across the country is on the rise. The glorification of guns like this costs lives. My family has experienced the pain of losing loved ones to gun violence, and I’m running for office to ensure that no one else ever has to go through that. ~ | | ~ Our lawmakers have failed to address the gun violence crisis for far too long. We need leaders in Congress who are going to stand up to the NRA and fight for universal background checks, banning assault weapons, and keeping guns out of the hands of white supremacists. And my GOP opponent will never do that. ~ | ~ | ~ | ~ | | | All my gratitude, Nida Allam | ~ 6409 Fayetteville Rd Ste 120-378 Durham, NC 27713 Paid for by Nida for NC Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. | Hi it’s Avery, Jevin’s Finance Director.

I am so proud of the way we power this campaign. We are fueled by regular, working Arizonians, and our movement is stronger because of it. However, that makes every dollar from people like you all the more important.

[_**We are a bit behind where we need to be in our April fundraising numbers, so we need all #TeamJevin supporters to step and pitch in what they can to get us back on track. Can we count on you to pitch in just $1 to help flip AZ-01 blue (though we wouldn’t be mad if you pitched in more)?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44216056/340601931/-1304906161?refcode=BLU-HODG-20220416-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI1MWEwZC1jMWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rTPb1zPYnflLj02zN1r-2Z0zu3JYvbCJ4re4_NNQd3U=)

body:
Winning one of the most competitive Senate races this cycle is going to come down to resources.
| | |
---
Friend: After I let this team know that I was falling short of my critical mid-month goal, supporters like you really came through. **Now,** **with the mid-month deadline coming up fast, I'm _so close_ to reaching my goal: I'm just $4,973 short.** Please, let me explain why closing this gap is so important:
**I'm a few points behind Marco Rubio in a race that could determine Senate control. NPR just called Rubio t****he second-most endangered incumbent Republican senator , and **The Miami Times even reported that I'm closing the polling gap!
Marco Rubio and national Republicans KNOW that I can win this race and expand our Senate majority, so they're launching desperate attacks against me to deceive voters._ _**The GOP has even stooped as low as attacking my law enforcement career.**
**Winning one of the most competitive Senate races this cycle is going to come down to resources. **If I'm going to fight back against Marco Rubio's attacks and show that our movement has what it takes to flip Florida blue, **I cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal – especially not one this critical.**

clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | I’m not going to lie -- I’m really worried. Republicans GAINED seats in the House last election, and they’re fighting tooth and nail to crush our Democratic Majority this year. They’re already making plans to defeat Democrats like me! That means we could lose our entire House Majority... So if we fall short of tonight’s goal, I could LOSE in November. | | | | | | I’m counting on you, Raul | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

We’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and standing outside grocery stores to get as _many_ votes as possible during the early voting period. **So, to help our field team run the strongest possible ground game, our campaign set a $15,000 fundraising goal to hit by midnight tonight!**
