clean_body: Everything starts with hitting this goal, first. | Friend, Right now, our field team is running an ambitious outreach operation – and we need everyone on Team Cranley-Fedor for this one! We’re knocking on doors, making phone calls, and standing outside grocery stores to get as many votes as possible during the early voting period. So, to help our field team run the strongest possible ground game, our campaign set a $15,000 fundraising goal to hit by midnight tonight! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We’re NOT asking you today to take time out of your busy schedule to knock on doors, or make phone calls to other Ohioans asking for their support (but if you’re interested, click here to sign up!). What we ARE asking for is your financial support so that our team can do that around the clock in these final days of the primary. Since the last poll showed that our race is a dead tie – with most voters still undecided – we have to put everything into our field operations to secure last-minute votes! = = Thanks for your support, Team Cranley-Fedor = = = John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena, are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too. = = = =_ Paid for by the Cranley Fedor for Ohio Committee CRANLEY FEDOR FOR OHIO COMMITTEE 545 EAST TOWN STREET COLUMBUS, OH 43215 United States Click here to

Listen, endorsements aren't just about who's supporting Karen, they represent the values and issues Karen will fight for as mayor. She'll work to defend reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, and our environment, and she'll amplify the voices of everyday Angelenos to make this city work for everyone.

Karen will bring her experience serving as a U.S. congresswoman, Speaker of the State House, a community organizer, and a civil rights advocate to city hall. Organizations, leaders, and grassroots activists agree Karen is THE leader who is ready to meet the moment and move Los Angeles forward. But with a packed primary, Karen is counting on your support.

clean_body: Karen is THE leader who can move L.A. forward. Take a look: Team — With the primary less than two months away, endorsements for Karen keep on rolling in. Momentum is building for Karen's historic race for mayor, and she's proud to have earned each of these endorsements. Take a look at some of Karen's supporters: Listen, endorsements aren't just about who's supporting Karen, they represent the values and issues Karen will fight for as mayor. She'll work to defend reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, and our environment, and she'll amplify the voices of everyday Angelenos to make this city work for everyone. Karen will bring her experience serving as a U.S. congresswoman, Speaker of the State House, a community organizer, and a civil rights advocate to city hall. Organizations, leaders, and grassroots activists agree Karen is THE leader who is ready to meet the moment and move Los Angeles forward. But with a packed primary, Karen is counting on your support. Let's go, Karen Bass for Mayor P.S. We are ramping up our voter outreach, and we need volunteers! Karen is building a grassroots campaign by and for the people of L.A. Thanks to L.A.'s matching funds program, individual donations from residents up to $214 may be matched 6-to-1 by the city, meaning your $5 contribution could become $35. name: Oliver Jones
subject: About my brother
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kermit Jones for Congress
body:
| | Hey team, Sunday was National Siblings Day, which made me realize I should tell you a bit about my brother Kermit. The fact that he became a doctor wasn’t very surprising to any of us. Growing up, Kermit was always so excited to go with Mom on her rounds visiting patients, soaking in her nurse jargon, and watching how she cared for our neighbors. I’ve seen how those early years with Mom have made Kermit the doctor he is today — how deeply he listens, and how he can relieve a stressful situation with his calm demeanor or a good joke. You can be the smartest person on the planet, but being an elected representative requires more – we deserve leaders who care and know how to listen. I’ve also seen how hard Kermit advocates for his patients. When Mom had cancer, he went to battle to get her the care she needed — the care that saved her life. **I know he’ll go to bat for his constituents in Congress like he does for all his patients.** [So team, will you help me say happy (belated) National Siblings Day to my brother by chipping in $10, $25, or $50 to help him flip CA-03? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44218476/340639162/-714857058?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220416siblingsday_OJ_90da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNjA4MWM2MC1mMmJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UYNEtfkw0jXlQ0zsKDp9BcUw4_rObKXZq10e07LllEc=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
| | | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=e77a156425&e=292fde286a)

| | | [ ](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=3b52a240d7&e=292fde286a)
---
| Folks – we have big news.

Our campaign just conducted a poll of the CA15 race, and I wanted to make sure you saw the results.

In case you missed it, the poll shows Kevin Mullin **way ahead** of the competition. These eye-popping poll results caught the attention of _The Mercury News_ , writing yesterday that “Mullin stands 14 points ahead of his closest opponent just two months until the primary,” at 31%-17%.

And it’s no wonder. Kevin comes to this race with the powerful endorsements of Congresswoman Jackie Speier, the California Democratic Party and over 100 of the federal, state, and local leaders Democratic voters trust. **San Mateo and San Francisco voters far and away favor and trust Kevin to represent them in Congress.**

Here’s where it really gets good: when voters hear more about Kevin’s decade-plus long record in elective office of delivering results for families, **we pull away with 39% to 18% lead over our nearest opponent. **

I’m also thrilled to tell you, Peter, that not only are we ahead in the polls, but also we just closed out our best fundraising quarter yet, pulling in more than any of our competitors, __all thanks to your help.__

[**But we’ve got to keep this #Mullmentum going. Click here to donate $39 right now to make sure we can keep working to expand our lead.**](https://kevinmullinforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=31b479dbea5973b27a9d19670&id=7dfe113e09&e=292fde286a)
On behalf of Team Mullin, I can’t thank you enough for your continued support.
Brian Rogers
Campaign Manager

name: Rick Scott
subject: re: My personal invitation
body:
Peter, I want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for being one of our most dedicated patriots.

Without you, our mission would never be possible.

**That’s why I want to PERSONALLY invite you to become an OFFICIAL member of our fund to take back the Senate.**

name: Yvette, Team James
subject: Why I believe in Letitia James
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,
I wanted to take a moment to introduce myself:

My name is Yvette Buckner, and I’m Attorney General Letitia James’ campaign manager. After spending the last few months working behind the scenes, I wanted to reach out to you now to share some exciting news: **Letitia is officially the Democratic pick for attorney general and is now on the general election ballot!**
It’s finally time to kick off the next phase of this campaign, but first I need your help, Peter. **We need to raise at least $15,000 before MIDNIGHT to ensure we have the resources needed for the exciting months ahead, but we’re still falling short.****[Please, will you rush $5 or more now to help Letitia continue her fight for a better New York?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217238/340608690/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4ZmY0My1kMWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lb6sy470yjuZwXsIeB9Je8pnAf_M3CGN1T6CBYhxvRQ=)**
I decided to join this team because I _**believe**_ in Letitia James. Not only do I know that she has the heart and determination needed to create a better New York – she has the track record, too.

Throughout her nearly four years as New York’s attorney general, Letitia James has stood tall against some of the most powerful and corrupt forces in the country – and proven time and again that she will never bow, and never break. She sued Big Pharma for its role in the tragic opioid crisis, took on major social media monopolies, combated manipulative actors responsible for the housing crisis, and _so much more._

I believe in Letitia James because she really, _truly_ __ believes in every fight she’s taken up for New York’s working families. And I know that she’s ready to fight for you and your loved ones for another four years – but first we need to fight for her.
**Attorney General James can’t win this election and defeat her GOP opponent without your help. That’s why it’s so urgent that I help Letitia raise $15,000 before midnight, but we’re still missing your support, Peter. **

[**Please, at this point in the election year, every dollar makes a huge difference. Will you rush whatever you can spare to Letitia’s re-election campaign before MIDNIGHT to ensure she has the resources needed to fend off her opponent’s attacks and win re-election?** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44217239/340608691/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk451-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4ZmY0My1kMWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lb6sy470yjuZwXsIeB9Je8pnAf_M3CGN1T6CBYhxvRQ=)

Thank you so much for being in this fight with Letitia – and with me. I’m so honored to be a part of this team.
Yvette Buckner
Campaign Manager
Team James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/b499bdb8-3bbc-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a/1db8ff43-d1bd-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGI4ZmY0My1kMWJkLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lb6sy470yjuZwXsIeB9Je8pnAf_M3CGN1T6CBYhxvRQ=&id=128810098) James for NY

New York, NY 10034

name: Cheri Beasley HQ
subject: Trump took aim at our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Trump’s smears and attacks will only get worse. Much worse.
#

Team - We wanted to make sure you saw what Donald Trump said at his rally in North Carolina last weekend. Trump is making this Senate race a top priority, and his smears and attacks will only get worse. Much worse.
[**Please consider making a donation right now. We must be ready for anything Trump and his corporate interest allies throw at Cheri Beasley.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=1&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=2&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
Donald Trump just wrapped up his rally in North Carolina with Madison Cawthorn and their hand-picked candidate in this race, Ted Budd.
And Trump took aim at our campaign, saying:
“We will crush the radical Democrat nominee in November.”
We cannot let this ridiculous smear go unanswered. [**Rush a $3 donation to our campaign today to fight back and make sure we defeat them in November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=3&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=4&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
This rally was exactly the kind of foolishness that you’d expect.
Trump, Madison Cawthorn, Mark Robinson, and Ted Budd are in lock-step. They share an extreme and dangerous vision for our country that would hurt our families and take us backward.
And they know the road to passing their agenda starts with winning this seat and the Senate majority. That’s why Trump is making North Carolina a top priority, and the super PACs run by his corporate and special interest cronies are taking note.
They will spend and say whatever it takes to try to defeat us, so it’s urgent that we come together right now:
[**Make a $3 donation to our campaign right now to ensure we have the resources to compete with whatever they throw our way. We cannot afford to stand down while Republicans go all-in to defeat us.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=5&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-apr22?refcode=em220416-2-T2T3&refcode2=725.357359.EClWN4&t=6&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4)**
Thank you!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=725_357359_EClWN4&akid=725%2E357359%2EEClWN4) today to help us make history.

body:

It’s official, folks. Donald Trump just called me “dangerous” to
Republicans “in a tough race” and threw his support behind my GOP
opponent, JD Vance.

We’re beating Vance in the polls by a single percentage point. But Trump’s
endorsement will bring a new wave of outside money and vicious attacks. We
have to fight back today.

Ohio will determine Senate control, and we cannot let this seat fall into
the hands of an out-of-touch millionaire and Silicon Valley hack. That’s
why I’m depending on you to step up right now, if you can.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10819?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3324%2E3611125%2E1qbBa- ]Make a donation to my campaign for Senate so we can flip Ohio blue,
expand our Democratic Senate majority, and cut workers in on the deal.
There has never been a more important time for you to give.

Tim Ryan

Fellow American,

We've been in the race for the United States Senate for seven months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat.

The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America.

President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote:

| _**"Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down."**_
---

Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including:

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=8d1d86b0646346a6bb6a98de69c4c892&_e=F1O61Zv4QnnskxdhTpyak6ZdEet_kdVkjhqyv1yt0BwOj4I4WYyDyh6G8mUNTqMKYKKahtnf_AT5maCpwdBkQ7dSaxc_PFFHzRgk2W-IV9SXujWX6rkD63CFWvtmCD8iTZ3ZYruUpv7ms5MfVYEtDysv_NNt2BvN6737OV0ua84jLCX9Kcey-loRE_0iDxYkul8iaGdgEQXTsRig_dV47_tgFBiebkAA1WQ28HNdwx2XvwwyCWsKoanApH9RErgCqmdl7nYXW_NjVKBIa1H7IBjga0uj0oV47t-zVSWf6ynROYSv04COwmZsgxudJb3anAkLJHa-30iBDyVD4Isb3lpUL0_XooO7Q6kJdAAtanMHT1EOSYeevc1GUyIgl9E7ZwXEi3btXJFanSntv5mxoxaxnllJI-qnBwHifPJqKz389G3SxuVXs0tNAZSU6EeNur-F1foBcyNyLS18A61Z_aoba1Hrz-05wkJ0w0wX0uWy96GTdTuKtXgayquh-WSF6bXj5ojey-Qq9Ck78uehcHHq9VXRVp9v4HbDT6BIC5TxOlhZ_RYqAyjd99RsPYb-m8QbOWojaFjOUCk7fzp3UCebiEQSW6LjA7eRvvyLVzuFh9TqWyZsk4XzqAx7ZIVJ)
We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side.

clean_body: It’s crucial that you’re on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? It's crucial that you're on Team Herschel today. Can we count on your personal endorsement? | Fellow American, We've been in the race for the United States Senate for seven months, and all signs point to this being the race to watch in the November elections. Polling shows it's already a dead heat. The race for the Senate seat here in Georgia - which will determine the balance of power in Washington - is no slam dunk for either party. That's why we're working on gathering the endorsements of conservatives all over America. President Trump was my very first supporter in this race, and he offered an endorsement any candidate would be honored to receive. When I announced my intent to enter this race, President Trump wrote: | "Herschel is tough on crime and borders, and he will always stand in support of law enforcement, military, and our vets. He will fight hard for our Second Amendment and voter integrity. Herschel will never let you down." Since President Trump endorsed our campaign, we've been blessed to receive multiple endorsements from other Republican leaders including: We're thankful for the support from Republican public officials, but we won't get anywhere without CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you on our side. I'm a team player - always have been, and we need you on our team. I believe in strong conservative values. I believe in smaller government, personal responsibility, and making sure ALL AMERICANS - regardless of income level, race, or religion - can pursue their dreams. While my opponent may have the support of Hollywood and national Democrats, we're building a grassroots army of PATRIOTS from around the country. Your endorsement will benefit our campaign as we work to flip Georgia's Senate seat RED and restore some sanity to Washington. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: SENATE ALERT (via NRSC)
subject: These results can’t hold
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Democrats could take the Senate this November
Fellow American,

Have you seen the latest projections from Cook Political Report?

Right now, they’re predicting 5 key races this November that are either a “toss-up” or, at best, “lean Republican.”

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ada8c047ffa44a1b3369b2d6fd87251&_e=RTncrmDMJItlgxzf4Q9I2HYr1_KlrhGigdAsvdfO94XKl6zGBNKHF2Jp6NRit8qR_65uYDk04PTH6RcQHn6dIGRHLJexRmhDeIRXzN9lTYbkw-LGXA25ZTrbJX-2UDFrFU6j4_gWM1ZRz6ADSLqYVtwoNXQ_tr_mTc6eNIE4UdGOHVY8znzVO1cDSdpU2ZJhlWO5sRHa4tlAz46onQpZjWG8cPkPlMxL5yicOpJ6TXf77DU7l8vOjf4yXdd5S6jzokHdn3nqSWVxr62PIWPo-aqIFJ1ZXcZHnZIJV9vwSVUbEY_9gEM7izafMOVqTaZ5FQAj8G8SRDnvysyiKLzCLI_e2jdRp3zEsJiHFiFld1__zwQg_YLrT7n7sCLY726KWykz_c1SRKvA8YLhx_tBdVFn5OTVzO9ufVWPIGKtbifSdIoYppjuWT-rKgFUlfWAgXmVLchstu70vdE9orPh6f09Hp-RWNdLPWGDuQwSQ34%3D)
[**These are 5 seats that we absolutely cannot afford to lose if we’re going to have any chance at taking back the Senate majority this November.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ada8c047ffa44a1b3369b2d6fd87251&_e=RTncrmDMJItlgxzf4Q9I2HYr1_KlrhGigdAsvdfO94XKl6zGBNKHF2Jp6NRit8qR_65uYDk04PTH6RcQHn6dIGRHLJexRmhDeIRXzN9lTYbkw-LGXA25ZTrbJX-2UDFrFU6j4_gWM1ZRz6ADSLqYVtwoNXQ_tr_mTc6eNIE4UdGOHVY8znzVO1cDSdpU2ZJhlWO5sRHa4tlAz46onQpZjWG8cPkPlMxL5yicOpJ6TXf77DU7l8vOjf4yXdd5S6jzokHdn3nqSWVxr62PIWPo-Sbx45mMe09cOGj0kA1N5iHTIXUdqlgXvAv9EfiMNiDKcTkRf3c3HnRaOboAecQ0W0tqOeErIW15MiRCy4o1F4PkZU5L-5WVbRIT0YwfjRk1cbG3TgJDo06qJWIdOZ7HT7Hn_y6NBu2H8aLy3yeDh-FpmQ2BdvCQgtFNB62r6t01OEaU-sbXle9xjPpzZM-_11YqATIMSPoYH9vfcnX-BB8%3D)

[** RETAKE THE MAJORITY! **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ada8c047ffa44a1b3369b2d6fd87251&_e=RTncrmDMJItlgxzf4Q9I2HYr1_KlrhGigdAsvdfO94XKl6zGBNKHF2Jp6NRit8qR_65uYDk04PTH6RcQHn6dIGRHLJexRmhDeIRXzN9lTYbkw-LGXA25ZTrbJX-2UDFrFU6j4_gWM1ZRz6ADSLqYVtwoNXQ_tr_mTc6eNIE4UdGOHVY8znzVO1cDSdpU2ZJhlWO5sRHa4tlAz46onQpZjWG8cPkPlMxL5yicOpJ6TXf77DU7l8vOjf4yXdd5S6jzokHdn3nqSWVxr62PIWPo-a6nFGac3IoFrpMtimJwxtEoXDAm_v-t44gnKNlUrySgShE0ARPrqXuAuBtyS2C0pIu4DSK3xOTJLjJLorAKOty-_rVG6xAMVk2z3yxOdgSZwua5xLMsNu-fidYKYqjqInUFVNki-8SLKIneP5DeJ61XM9kA9NcEvPAUqK7Y6uIBuFrixVkafMJ5xy5tjoISRLt5f0784hNOzC4aqXkAN5M%3D)
Winning these open seats would give Republicans a _**great**_ chance at retaking our majority - and allowing us to get to work to fix all the issues caused by Biden, Schumer, Pelosi, and the rest of D.C.’s liberal elites.

clean_body: Democrats could take the Senate this November Fellow American, Have you seen the latest projections from Cook Political Report? Right now, they’re predicting 5 key races this November that are either a “toss-up” or, at best, “lean Republican.” Winning these open seats would give Republicans a great chance at retaking our majority - and allowing us to get to work to fix all the issues caused by Biden, Schumer, Pelosi, and the rest of D.C.’s liberal elites. But it’s not just Republicans who need to capitalize on taking these open seats. Look at how many Democrat seats are also vulnerable this November: If we can get every single patriot like you to we’ll be in a great position not only to hold onto our seats, but also to flip a few current Democrat seats! name: Wisconsin Senate Update
subject: Ron Johnson raised $7.1 million last quarter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
We know your time is valuable, especially on a holiday weekend, so we’ll keep this message brief. Thank you in advance for taking the time to read it.

**Ron Johnson outraised every Democrat in the race with a whopping $7.1 million reported for the last quarter — and now, he’s out with a brand-new ad.**

As you know, we launched our own TV ad buy last month. It was a difficult decision that made our budget much tighter than we had anticipated this early in the campaign. But we needed to make this seven-figure investment to compete with Ron Johnson on the airwaves and get Sarah's message in front of as many Wisconsin voters as possible.

With the help of this incredible grassroots team, we were able to keep our ads running through the month of March. Now, we have to raise enough funds to compete with Ron Johnson on TV this month. So, we’re asking:

**[Will you make a donation to Sarah Godlewski's U.S. Senate campaign and help us raise the funds we need to keep our ads running through the month of April? clean_body: We know your time is valuable, especially on a holiday weekend, so we’ll keep this message brief. Thank you in advance for taking the time to read it.
